programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie and Frank accidentally crash their car through the wall of Rays house, causing a bitter family dispute - and forcing Debra into the role of peacemaker. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert believes Amy is the woman of his dreams and decides to tell her the truth about Joanne and Stefania, but she is so shocked by the confession that she refuses to take him back

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray accidentally kills Allys pet hamster while the kids are away from home for the weekend, so Debra insists they give it a dignified funeral. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is promoted to lieutenant, much to the dismay of Ray, who feels overshadowed and becomes convinced his own prestige is suffering as a result. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes to a wedding, where he finds himself regretting a missed opportunity to escort a high-school date to her door, and is tormented by thoughts of what might have been. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Chandler in a Box
programme.desc: Chandler agrees to spend Thanksgiving in a packing crate as penance for kissing Kathy, and the friends decide to give each other seasonal gifts. Monica visits Richards son, who finds her every bit as attractive as his father did. Comedy, guest starring Michael Vartan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Theyre Going to Party!
programme.desc: Things start looking up for the gang as Monica gets a career opportunity that is too good to turn down and Rachel is offered a promotion. Meanwhile, Ross and Chandler are excited to hear an old friend is coming to visit. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Girl from Poughkeepsie
programme.desc: Ross embarks on a long-distance relationship, Chandler sets Rachel up with one of his colleagues, and Phoebe composes a seasonal song for her friends. Monica has trouble asserting her authority at work and hires Joey so she can fire him in front of the staff

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes half-brother makes a startling announcement and asks a great favour of her, while Joey attempts to break down social barriers when he takes a job as a tour guide at Rosss museum. Chandler fears not living up to Kathys expectations

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns the result of her pregnancy test and the friends competitive spirit gets the better of them in a battle of the sexes arising from an apparently simple challenge. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel schemes to get a handsome client to ask her out on a date, while Chandlers girlfriend is driven away by his jealousy. Guest starring Tate Donovan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joeys Dirty Day
programme.desc: Chandler visits a strip club and Rachel comes to regret asking Ross for a favour. Meanwhile, Charlton Heston discovers his co-star Joey in a compromising position on the first day of filming

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Rugby
programme.desc: Ross makes the mistake of agreeing to a game of rugby with Emilys tough English friends. Meanwhile, one of Chandlers old flames turns up out of the blue - and it seems it is not just a flying visit

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel spoils Rosss plans of a romantic last evening with Emily before she returns to England by organising a farewell party and inviting everyone. Meanwhile Phoebes pregnancy causes her to abandon her vegetarian lifestyle as she craves meat. Comedy, guest starring Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Free Porn
programme.desc: Ross pours out his heart to Emily, but is unprepared for her reaction, while Phoebe receives surprising news about her pregnancy. Chandler and Joey get free adult films on their TV and try to make sure they do not disappear

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels New Dress
programme.desc: Rachels date is ruined when Joshuas parents return home earlier than expected and catch her parading round in a skimpy nightie - which she then has to pretend is a new dress. Starring Jennifer Aniston and Tate Donovan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Haste
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel plot to take back their old apartment from Chandler and Joey, and there are major changes afoot for lovebirds Ross and Emily. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Wedding Dresses
programme.desc: Chandler reaches the end of his tether over Joeys snoring and forces him to seek professional help, while Rachel has a drastic reaction to Rosss engagement. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross reminisces with Rachel about the good times they had when they were dating, as the invitations go out for his wedding. Meanwhile, the others work out whether they can attend the ceremony. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Worst Best Man Ever
programme.desc: Joey somehow manages to lose Rosss wedding ring at the stag party, while Phoebes pregnancy causes her to experience violent mood swings. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Wedding - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Rachel and a heavily pregnant Phoebe stay at home while Chandler, Joey and Monica go to England for Rosss wedding to Emily. Once there, however, it seems all Joey and Chandler can do is bicker. Guest starring Richard Branson and Sarah Ferguson

programme.desc: Its a double dose of Claudia for the armchair critics as they watch the latest episodes of The Celebrity Traitors and Strictly Come Dancing. They also share their opinions on Hollyoaks, Dragons Den, Beat the Chasers, Celebrity Help! My House is Haunted and the BBC News reports about Prince Andrew

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Mostafas new date Megan has a list of qualities shes looking for in a man and is trying to put the past behind her after being cheated on, while Corinne is hoping it will be third time lucky as she meets Will. Gym manager Claire is impressed by the physique of former basketball player Kenny, Tommy continues his search for Mr Right and suave Parisian Jean-Christophe bonds with twice-divorced writer and fellow wine connoisseur Sarah. Former Countdown contestant Jonny also returns, hoping for someone hell have an intellectual rapport with. Could mystical world traveller Clare be his dream woman?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Talkative teacher Sarah-Jayne is looking for her Prince Charming, Ross returns to the restaurant armed with more jokes following his disappointing date with Regan, and glamorous Rachel talks to old romantic Alan about her experiences of living with OCD. Also meeting each other for the first time are well-groomed rom-com fan Rich and self-confessed ladette Millie

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Strictly Come Dancing, Victoria Beckham, Blue Lights, Slow Horses, Antiques Roadshow, Eva Longoria: Searching for Spain, Police Interceptors and a BBC news report on parking apps

programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the comedy, all the members of the Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan discover that saying goodbye is a lot harder than it seems

programme.desc: Phil tries to teach his son a lesson in responsibility by stealing his unlocked bike - but ends up taking the wrong one. Elsewhere, Mitchell and Cameron decide to introduce Lily to other children and arrange a play date, while Jay tries to bond with Manny

programme.desc: Vickys still on edge after recent events, while Sienna makes a tough decision. And after months of torment and pain, Dodger finally has his chance to expose Sully for what he really is, but Sullys ready to fight dirty. Donnys family support him as he faces the truth

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Featuring a variety of cats doing strange things, soldiers stuck in the sand and a dog balancing on a rope

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil finds himself in an awkward situation when he meets his former high-school girlfriend, who confesses she still has feelings for him, while Mitchell stands up to his boss and Jay summons up the courage to confess he killed Mannys turtle

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: There is impending chaos in the air when Jay holds a Super Bowl party at the same time as Claire is hosting Haleys baby shower - both events being in Jays house

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron and Mitchell learn that Lilly has started her periods, so they call in reinforcements to give her advice. Phil tells Luke he recently attended a prenatal class with Haley

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jays annual hiking trip to find an elusive eagle after Gloria asks them to keep an eye on him, while Alex, Claire and Haley plan a baby shower

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil feels emasculated when Bill wows Dylan and Luke with heroic tales. He gets them over for some male bonding, but it goes rather wrong

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer bring the cookery and chat show over to E4 while the Winter Paralympics are over on the main channel. They chat to Ben Shephard about ITVs mountaineering challenge The Summit, Ruby Wax has the lowdown on her tour, Mollie King and Matt Edmondson talk about their podcast, Sian Williams discusses her new book and Emmett J Scanlan previews the new adaptation of A Woman of Substance. Joshua Idehen provides the music

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring ducks going up an escalator, animal impressions, and a few narrow escapes on a snowboard and rally driving

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Giuseppis and Sante La Brea to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCools from season one

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eaterys co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop (1990)
programme.desc: A tough detective is forced to pose as a preschool teacher in a bid to capture a drug dealer whose son is one of the pupils. However, his biggest challenge turns out to be controlling a class full of five-year-olds. Comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Penelope Ann Miller, Linda Hunt, Pamela Reed and Richard Tyson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Mayor Quimbys nephew is wrongly accused of assault, presenting Bart with a dilemma - if he volunteers the information that would clear the lads name, he risks being expelled from school for playing truant

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family celebrates Maggies birthday. Bart steals Homers wallet to pay for an Itchy and Scratchy souvenir, and Grandma Bouvier is swept off her feet by Grampa - but Mr Burns provides romantic competition, convinced she is the woman for him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer teaches an adult education course on the secrets of marital bliss. However, Marge spoils it by kicking him out of the house for revealing intimate domestic details to his students

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The City of New York v Homer Simpson
programme.desc: Barney borrows Homers car and vanishes on a drunken binge. Weeks later, Homer gets a letter from New York saying the vehicle is illegally parked between the towers of the World Trade Centre. Although Homer hates the Big Apple - owing to an unfortunate incident from his youth - the family heads to there to try to get the car back

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: As Principal Skinner prepares to enjoy a ceremony celebrating his 20th year as head of Springfield Elementary, a stranger exposes him as a former street punk who stole his identity. Featuring the guest voice of Martin Sheen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another selection of spooky stories, including parodies of Bambi and Parasite, and a tale of a tree coming to life after Homer chops it down

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe is faced with a difficult choice when Evergreen Terrace develops a traffic problem

programme.title: The Transporter (2002)
programme.desc: An underworld courier lives by a simple code - to never ask what he is transporting. Action adventure, starring Jason Statham, Shu Qi, Matt Schulze and Francois Berleand

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jerseys Spanish Pavillion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eaterys fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray is angered when he finds out that Adam has no interest in auditioning for a school stage production. Meanwhile, Beverly interferes with Ericas latest career plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray grow concerned about Adams obsession with toys, so try to distract him with a new hobby. Meanwhile, Ericas band the Dropouts decide to audition for reality television talent show Star Search, but their egos threaten the bands future

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire needs to get everyone out of the house as she tries to impress a reporter from a womens business magazine, while Jay attempts to spend quality time with Manny

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil, Claire, Alex and Luke love having the twins around, but find taking care of them is exhausting. However, when they realise the babies might help them with a few things on their to-do lists, they offer to give Haley the day off

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders buys the Simpsons home when they are unable to pay their mortgage and rents it back to them at an affordable rate, but Homer soon takes advantage of his new landlords generosity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa has to go undercover as a nun and infiltrate a convent when Maggie goes missing after being left on its doorstep. Meanwhile, Marge is left temporarily blind when she stares at a total eclipse, so Homer has to sort out their rat-infested kitchen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to eat bland food after he burns his taste buds while trying to copy a fire-eating street performer. He becomes a regular at Springfield Elementarys canteen where he learns a new parenting technique to try out on Bart and Lisa - but its overbearing nature leads to disaster. Meanwhile, Marge enjoys a sauna she discovers in the basement

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for West Babylon, New York, to help the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts. The chef struggles to cope with disorganised staff and an unappealing menu, but quickly realises the real problem lies in the kitchen, where a lack of leadership and communication is causing serious trouble

programme.desc: The family constructs a tennis court in the back garden and Bart becomes an expert player, much to the annoyance of a jealous Homer. Featuring the guest voices of Venus and Serena Williams, Andre Agassi and Pete Sampras

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell learns a valuable life lesson when Murray, a former resident of the house, shows up unexpectedly. Meanwhile, the Dunphys old neighbour-turned-tech-titan Kenneth comes to visit with a big surprise for Phil, and Mannys dad Javier shows up with a big opportunity for his son

programme.desc: Kat Cole goes undercover among the workforce of her company Cinnabon Incorporated, which serves sweet treats from more than 900 bakeries in 40 countries worldwide. She seeks advice from her old boss, former Hooters CEO Coby Brooks, who also went undercover, in his own organisation. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the riverside town of LIsle-sur-la-Sorgue in south-eastern France, where his culinary hero Keith Floyd once owned a restaurant. Buying produce from its floating market, and a Floyd-style hat, James sets up his mobile kitchen on a bridge overlooking the river, and cooks peaches pain perdu in the sunshine. Heading back in the direction of the town, James samples some truffle-laden dishes at renowned restaurant La Beaugraviere

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads to Normandy and sets up his mobile kitchen in one of the many calvados orchards in the area, making a dish of artichokes with hollandaise. He also visits restaurant Le Pave dAuge in Beuvron-en-Auge to meets a chef who likes to cook with as much butter as he does

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present bread week, which kicks off with a sweet and savoury signature round. For the technical challenge, the bakers are asked to create a tribute to the NHS, while the showstopper is an ambitiously artistic challenge featuring decorative designs in bread. Judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood sample their efforts, and choose this weeks Star Baker - and this weeks departing contestant

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The competition starts to heat up during chocolate week, as Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood set three tricky challenges to test the remaining bakers. Who will impress Prue and Paul enough to keep their place in the tent, and who will be heading home? Presented by Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.desc: Adams in Bologna tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including Bolognese sauce and a sweet made with rice and almonds

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Italy
programme.desc: Adams in Naples tasting iconic foods named after this city, including the classic Napolitina pizza and a pasta dish called spaghetti alle vongole

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the riverside town of LIsle-sur-la-Sorgue in south-eastern France, where his culinary hero Keith Floyd once owned a restaurant. Buying produce from its floating market, and a Floyd-style hat, James sets up his mobile kitchen on a bridge overlooking the river, and cooks peaches pain perdu in the sunshine. Heading back in the direction of the town, James samples some truffle-laden dishes at renowned restaurant La Beaugraviere

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads to Normandy and sets up his mobile kitchen in one of the many calvados orchards in the area, making a dish of artichokes with hollandaise. He also visits restaurant Le Pave dAuge in Beuvron-en-Auge to meets a chef who likes to cook with as much butter as he does

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present bread week, which kicks off with a sweet and savoury signature round. For the technical challenge, the bakers are asked to create a tribute to the NHS, while the showstopper is an ambitiously artistic challenge featuring decorative designs in bread. Judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood sample their efforts, and choose this weeks Star Baker - and this weeks departing contestant

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The competition starts to heat up during chocolate week, as Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood set three tricky challenges to test the remaining bakers. Theres a deceptively simple traybake in the signature, a technical packed full of chocolate and nuts, and a celebration showstopper that pushes the bakers skills with white chocolate to the limit. Who will impress Prue and Paul enough to keep their place in the tent, and who will be heading home? Presented by Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present the halfway point of the culinary contest, with pastry week. The bakers must put their own stamp on a Cornish classic and are set a retro technical challenge. For the showstopper round, they must concoct a classic tart in a pastry cage, before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood decide who will be this weeks star baker and who will be going home

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host the shows first ever Japanese week. For the signature challenge the bakers tackle a Japanese version of Asian staple steamed buns, while the technical round involves a tricky recipe involving multiple layers. The showstopper round is themed around kawaii - the Japanese love of all things cute

programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts as five friends attempt to answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, before trying to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Interview with a Hitman (2012)
programme.desc: An assassin is raised to be the perfect killing machine in the slums of Romania, but when his masters betray him, he fakes his death and tries to start a new life in London. However, he soon finds his dark past coming back to haunt him. Action thriller, starring Luke Goss, Caroline Tillette and Danny Midwinter

programme.title: Beyond Suspicion (2018)
programme.desc: On his release from a prison sentence for crimes of which he was innocent, a shamed former cop connects a murder case to a government conspiracy involving rogue agents from a top spy agency. Crime thriller, starring Karl Urban, Sofia Vergara and Andy Garcia.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Legend of Butch and Sundance (2004)
programme.desc: The story of how two of Americas most infamous outlaws joined forces and tried to make their fortunes with a string of daring robberies. Western, starring David Rogers, Ryan Browning, Rachelle Lefevre and Michael Biehn

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.sub-title: A Little Town with an Accent
programme.desc: The gang discovers a supposedly dead organised crime boss is behind the intimidation of several gas station owners. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The gang heads for Vietnam to track down a generals missing daughter. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Part one of three. General Stockwell blackmails the gang by kidnapping Hannibal and threatening to hurt him if the trio fail to secure the release of hostages held on a plane to Spain

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Part two of three. The gang is locked in a military prison awaiting trial for the murder of a colonel. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Part three of three. As the gang faces a firing squad, General Stockwell agrees to a rescue attempt - but at a price. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: Thunder in the Sun (1959)
programme.desc: Wagon-train scout Lon Bennett leads Basque settlers on a perilous journey to California, where they hope to establish a vineyard. However, Lons open pursuit of Gabrielle, a member of the group, causes friction - particularly for her husband and his brother. Western, starring Susan Hayward, Jeff Chandler and Blanche Yurka

programme.title: The Professionals (1966)
programme.desc: A wealthy Texan hires four mercenaries to rescue his wife, who has been abducted and taken to Mexico by a bandit gang. However, when they find her, she refuses to leave and they have to take her by force - ending in a cross-border chase with the outlaws on their trail. Western adventure, with Burt Lancaster, Lee Marvin, Robert Ryan, Woody Strode, Jack Palance and Claudia Cardinale

programme.title: Angel and the Bad Man (2009)
programme.desc: Remake of the John Wayne classic telling the story of notorious gunfighter, Quirt Evans. Western, starring Lou Diamond Phillips and Deborah Kara Unger

programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A convalescent is trapped in a living nightmare during a plane journey when he sees a gremlin on the wing. Classic episode, starring William Shatner, Edward Kemmer and Nick Cravat

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The twisted tale of a unique watch with the ability to freeze time and stop all movement in the world. Classic sci-fi, starring Richard Kiley, Jenny Agutter and Norman Lloyd

programme.title: Zero Dark Thirty (2012)
programme.desc: A CIA operative joins a team of intelligence and military operatives in the aftermath of the September 11 attacks. She spends the next 10 years searching for information on the whereabouts of Osama bin Laden, ultimately leading to the final raid on the terrorist leaders hideout. Kathryn Bigelows fact-based drama, starring Jessica Chastain and Mark Strong

programme.title: D.O.A. (1988)
programme.desc: A burned-out college professor is accused of murdering his wifes lover, and tries to cope by going on an all-night drinking binge - but wakes to discover someone has slipped him a fatal poison, leaving him with just 24 hours to find his would-be killer. Remake of the 1950 thriller, with Dennis Quaid, Meg Ryan, Charlotte Rampling, Daniel Stern and Jane Kaczmarek

programme.title: Out of Sight (1998)
programme.desc: A charming bank robber breaks out of jail and takes a female US Marshal hostage. Managing to escape, she sets out to track him down as he prepares for one last job - but as the chase intensifies, so do their feelings for each other. Steven Soderberghs romantic crime drama, based on Elmore Leonards novel, with George Clooney, Jennifer Lopez, Ving Rhames and Don Cheadle

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Part three of three. As the gang faces a firing squad, General Stockwell agrees to a rescue attempt - but at a price. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent is shocked to discover the invaders are using a type of seed spore which can develop into fully grown alien creatures. Guest starring Gene Hackman

programme.title: Malibu Shark Attack (2009)
programme.desc: An underwater earthquake causes a tsunami that unleashes a pack of goblin sharks on an unsuspecting Malibu beach. Quick thinking from the local lifeguards ensures the area is cleared before the monsters strike, but a number of people remain abandoned in high water and must fight the creatures to reach dry land. Horror, starring Peta Wilson, Warren Christie and Chelan Simmons

programme.title: Legend Lowdown

programme.title: The Savage (1952)
programme.desc: A white man raised by the Sioux after his family were killed by Crow warriors finds his loyalties tested in later life. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Susan Morrow and Peter Hansen

programme.title: True Grit: A Further Adventure (1978)
programme.desc: The further adventures of True Grit Rooster Cogburn which has him battling injustice, with Warren Oates taking over the iconic starring role

programme.title: Legend Lowdown

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.sub-title: Is There in Truth No Beauty?
programme.desc: Security is stepped up on board the Enterprise in anticipation of a visit from a Medusan ambassador whose appearance can blind any onlookers. However, when the ship is placed in danger, Spock attempts to form a risky psychic link with the intriguing visitor. Vintage sci-fi, starring William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent stows away on board an alien vessel, in the hope of learning how susceptible the invaders are to human diseases. Roy Thinnes stars

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The gang joins a football team on a trip behind the Iron Curtain - to free an East German scientist. Action adventure, starring Robert Vaughn, Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The community is terrorised when a group of white supremacists kill a boy and set fire to the local church. Adventure, starring Chuck Norris

programme.title: Riddick (2013)
programme.desc: A fugitive is left for dead by his treacherous followers on a dangerous world full of lethal predators. He lures bounty hunters to the planet in the hope of killing them and stealing their spacecraft, but finds himself forced to work with them against an attack by the monsters at the top of the food chain. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel and Katee Sackhoff

programme.title: They Live (1988)
programme.desc: A drifter arrives in Los Angeles seeking work, only to discover the citys population is being dominated by aliens who control their victims through subliminal advertising. John Carpenters satirical sci-fi adventure, starring Roddy Piper, Keith David and Meg Foster

programme.title: Acts of Violence (2018)
programme.desc: Three Midwestern brothers, a crime lord, and an incorruptible cop are on a deadly collision course when the youngest brothers fiancee is kidnapped by human traffickers. Crime drama, starring Bruce Willis, Cole Hauser and Shawn Ashmore

programme.title: War Pigs (2015)
programme.desc: A disgraced military officer is sent on a mission behind enemy lines during the Second World War. With the aid of a grizzled First World War veteran and a German Foreign Legion captain who has rebelled against the Nazi regime, he puts together a recon squad to find and capture a German secret weapon. Action adventure, starring Luke Goss, Dolph Lundgren and Mickey Rourke

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On a Thursday day shift, a young man has come off his motorbike and slid along the road while not wearing any protective clothing. A young boy is complaining of chest pains; theres a family history of heart problems and his mum is worried about him. On the same shift, a man with only one leg has suspected deep vein thrombosis and needs to be treated in hospital. Paramedics arrive at an address to find a doctor in hospital scrubs holding a baby. Its a father and son and the baby has a worrying cough while a woman is complaining of severe abdominal pain

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A call comes in from the police saying a young man has collapsed outside a nightclub and isnt breathing. Its a category one emergency - the highest priority - meaning theres an immediate threat to life. A young woman is having a sickle cell crisis. This genetic condition makes her normally round blood cells form a sickle shape, sticking together and causing excruciating pain. A woman has the highest blood pressure that one of the paramedics has ever seen, and she needs to go to hospital urgently. A former soldier collapses and is trapped behind a door, and a woman has crippling chest pains. Her condition is a medical mystery that can only be solved with a trip to AandE

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The latest batch of patients to be treated in the AandE department of Londons Kings College Hospital includes two with serious head injuries, including a cyclist from Brighton who has been airlifted to the building. Also brought in by helicopter is a father-of-four who fell from scaffolding as he repaired a roof, while other cases include former docker Bill, who has hurt his knee while drinking at his local working mens club

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The stories of children and teenagers brought into AandE. Sixteen-year-old Ellie has suspected spinal injuries after being thrown from her horse and crushed against a fence, while consultant Jacqui Butler treats four-year-old Destiny, who has a fishbone stuck in his tonsils from his lunchtime curry. Plus, a pregnant woman experiences intense pain following a sudden haemorrhage

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of the teams favourite investigations. Kate Quilton visits Haagen-Dazs to find out why some vanilla ice-creams are more expensive than others, while Helen Lawal heads to Tanzania to see the lengths vanilla farmers go to in the production of the natural flavouring. Matt Tebbutt travels to the Netherlands to explore the myth that Edam was once used as emergency cannon balls and Jimmy Doherty learns about an innovative solution to the problem of shellfish feeding on discarded plastic in the sea

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition begins in Stroud with horse trainer Melanie, who has opted for a quick and easy vegetarian menu so she can focus on a glamorous night of hosting - and partying

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Elliot hosts the second dinner party in Stroud and after making a good impression on radio presenter Kate, his guests are expecting big things. Tensions rise between Kate and fellow horse owner Mel as to who owns the most livestock leaving Belarusian rock fan Tasty and events manager Liv bored

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Belarusian rocker Tasty hosts the third night in Stroud and presents a taste of Mother Russia inspired by her culture and heritage. Kate and Mel squabble yet again as they come up with roles for their newly formed band, Elliots Angels, much to Livs disapproval. With some Russian dancing and pretend figure skating its an interesting night but will Tasty do enough to impress her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth evening in Stroud, Gloucestershire, marketing executive Liz incorporates her love of Italian food into her menu, hoping to impress her guests with large arancini balls, homemade ravioli and a rather lumpy panna cotta. Elliot feels his place at the top of the leaderboard is under threat, however Tatsy finds the constant chat about horses from Mel and Kate increasingly annoying

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final evening in Stroud, Gloucestershire, its a battle of the risottos as radio presenter Kate produces one very similar to that made earlier by arch-rival Mel. However, Kate has a secret weapon in the shape of a magical table decoration that may help her clinch the £1,000 prize

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets Andi and Neil from York, who dream of retiring permanently to Spain with their son Joel and spaniel Dixie. Theyre looking for a three-bedroom house with a dog-friendly garden, where barbeque enthusiast Neil can cook up a storm close to the beach close to the coastal town of Mazarron, near Murcia. Laura has five sizzling options for their budget of £145,000, but will any of them turn out to be their new forever home?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Dawn and Ian, who want to fulfil their long-held dream of owning a house in Tavira, Portugal, for regular getaways with their two grown-up daughters and their dogs. Danni lines up five options for them to consider, all within their budget of £250,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth helps Harriet to find a holiday home in the popular resort of Villamartin on Spains Costa Blanca on a budget of £110,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King is in south-west Cyprus helping house-hunter Uri find a permanent home for him and his wife Hazel. The pair, from Aberdeen, are keen to escape the cold Scottish winters anf have a budget of £200,000 to help realise their dreams

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth jets off to Portugals Algarve to help house-hunters Audrey and Tony find the perfect holiday home. Audrey and Tony first met five years ago while on holiday in the Algarve, so its always been a special place for them. Lee lines up five properties for them to consider, all within their budget of £220,000

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Farhalls in Windsor, who are unsure whether to sell their four-bedroom detached house or transform the layout of their home. Graham loves living in Windsor but Nardeth is growing tired of their cramped and dated house, and would prefer to look for a new property they could purchase

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp searches across Balham and Putney in south-west London, with Hannah and Ben, who are ready to buy after years of renting. They have a good budget, but first-time buyers nerves have led to 40-odd viewings and no deal. Phil Spencer helps Hemani and Nigel, whos from Australia, as they seek an Aussie-proportioned property in the Thames Valley

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This week kicks off at Naim and Saras Lovelady Shield Hotel in Cumbria. The views are welcomed by most of the Bandguests - but one pair are preoccupied by the furniture

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks second visit comes from the Ryebeck Hotel in the Lake District, with glorious views of Lake Windermere. But its other views left in the feedback that take centre stage

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers go off-grid at Dale2Swale Glamping in Richmond, North Yorkshire, but some guests are worried about how theyll survive the night without their creature comforts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week takes the BandBers to Ashbourne Holidays in Derbyshire, where deer wander around the grounds and the guests pay a visit to a local animal park

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, the BandBers meet for the last time, and clash over furniture failings and clock complaints. Sparks fly - rather ironically - over a lack of electricity

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man whos having a heart attack but thinks hes just pulled a muscle. He has no history of cardiac issues, but an examination confirms that his heart is blocked. A day out hiking ends badly for a man when he falls and injures his ankle, and the paramedics tea and toast making skills are needed for a diabetic patient.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The stories of people who changed the course of their lives by taking huge risks, including a consultant who swapped an army career for the frontline of emergency medicine. Two motorcyclists are brought in after high speed impacts, while a retired coal miner experiences major chest pains

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham, one of the busiest AandE departments in Europe, 77-year-old Keith is treated for a cardiac arrest and Joanna has a spinal fracture after falling from her horse. In the Urgent Treatment Unit, 79-year-old John is being patched up after being run over by a car at his local market

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics find a woman whos fallen, is on blood thinners and may have a bleed on the brain. A man is finding it hard to communicate and his face is drooped on the right-hand side; all tell-tale signs of a possible stroke. The family of a baby with a complex medical history ring for help when his heart begins beating extremely fast

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The stories of people who changed the course of their lives by taking huge risks, including a consultant who swapped an army career for the frontline of emergency medicine. Two motorcyclists are brought in after high speed impacts, while a retired coal miner experiences major chest pains

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham, one of the busiest AandE departments in Europe, 77-year-old Keith is treated for a cardiac arrest and Joanna has a spinal fracture after falling from her horse. In the Urgent Treatment Unit, 79-year-old John is being patched up after being run over by a car at his local market

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of the teams favourite investigations, including Kate Quiltons visit to McVities in Carlisle to find out why so many biscuits have little holes all over them. Jimmy Doherty heads to Portugal to see how corks are made for wine bottles, while Matt Tebbutt is in Italy to learn why mascarpone is more expensive than other soft cheeses

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks camping connoisseurs go in search of the perfect pitch in north Wales. Their first stop is the coastal campsite of Porth Iago on the Llyn Peninsula

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole gives Simon OBrien a motorcycling masterclass in Wiltshire as the duo seek more items to fix up and sell on to make profits for their owners

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Married couple Mo and Anthony seek a holiday apartment with a sea view in Torremolinos on Spains Costa del Sol. Laura Hamilton is tasked with showing them the best of what their £130,000 budget can get them. However, whether any of the five properties the property expert has up her sleeve will result in an offer remains to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Jen is the first person to stage for a week of dinner parties in Glasgow, serving up a pink-themed evening with a straightforward menu to impress her guests. She needs to pull out all the stops to impress partnerships manager Dorine, food vlogger Darren, psychic medium Robert and nail technician Kasia of her virues as host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Psychic medium Robert is the second to host in and around Glasgow, hoping to wow his guests with a glimpse into their futures and a menu replicating his wedding meal in Turkey

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glasgow food vlogger Darren serves up a menu his guests are unlikely to forget in a hurry as he is deep frying everything on it, including lasagne, lettuce and chocolate bars

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Next to host in and around the Glasgow area is 28-year-old partnerships manager Dorine, who opts for a bit of sparkle with glitter and gold, and a French-inspired menu sprinkled with flavours of her childhood. However, tensions between Darren and Kasia remain

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Last to host in and around the Glasgow area is Polish nail technician Kasia, who hopes to scoop the £1,000 prize with an evening of traditional Polish food. It proves an entertaining night with a lively game of Polish Horseshoes, boys versus girls knocking bottles over with frisbees and confessions of phobias around the table leaving everyone open-mouthed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in rural Co Durham at Bowlees Farm Holiday Cottages, where married couple Tony and Viv Smith hope that their tranquil setting, private hot tubs and indoor swimming pool will impress their visitors. Their guests are bowled over by the views and the facilities, but friends Jane and Rachel find fault with the cleanliness in the kitchen. At dinner, its revealed that breakfast will be provided by the local farm shop, the only facility that Tony and Viv dont seem to have. Despite the clean plates, married couple Amanda and Howard make their feelings clear on the lack of options

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Piebald Inn in Hunmanby, North Yorkshire, where the lack of a thermostat and a divisive design idea irritate some of the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Stoneleigh House Hotel, a boutique townhouse in the heart of Buckingham run by Jane Parslow and Rachel Rawding. At dinner, the guests are filled in about the Piebalds main attraction, but Jane and Viv dont see pie to pie about a design idea. The group members have a mixed nights sleep, but they all agree about the quality of the breakfast - which is topped off by a surprise from John

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth and final venue is glamping site Evenlode Grounds in the Cotswolds, owned by Howard and Amanda Wooliams, who impress their guests by revealing it is also a working farm

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. First up to fire back on their feedback are Tony and Viv, followed by John and Lesley, who are both desperate to know why Jane and Rachel were the only two who wouldnt return to their BandBs

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: The BMW 2002 Turbo was the first European production car to have a turbo-charged engine. It also happens to be on Tim Shaws all-time favourite list. The vehicle in question belongs to 79-year-old boy racer Raymond from the West Midlands, who has owned the car, which was built in 1974, for over 30 years. But Ray now has health problems and his beloved car has ended up rusting on his drive. When Tim and Fuzz Townshend get the vehicle to the workshop, they discover that its going to be even more work than they were expecting

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a Welsh motoring enthusiasts beloved Vauxhall Astra back to its former glory

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Three-year-old Ollie and his family search for a forever friend. Can Frankie the pup help Simon overcome a childhood dog attack trauma? Jaran has the chance to become Liz and Scotts first dog

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin meets Mike and Sarah, who bought a remote smallholding in the Derbyshire Dales, somewhere to rear animals and provide a home for themselves and their elderly parents. Kevin follows the couple as they set out to build a 21st-century version of a historic Derbyshire longhouse. Enormous, corrugated and with a highly complex roof shape, it was never going to be an easy build. But soon they face delays and their schedule begins to slide. However, that is nothing compared with the problems of a more personal nature that hit the project

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: As Christmas looms, Amanda and family face re-roofing Anty Johns during a fearsome Dales winter, which follows a wet and stormy autumn that has left the project months behind schedule. Builder Richard and roofer Steven must do their best to complete the arduous and technical challenge of positioning dozens of stone slabs, while trying to stay dry and warm

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A builder falls at work and dislocates his shoulder in such an unusual way it takes a five-strong team to pull it into place. Alan, who is in his sixties and had one leg amputated in 2009, comes in with the other dangerously swollen following a holiday in Goa, and 83-year-old James has to be persuaded by senior sister AnnMarie to accept treatment for a cyst on his knee

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Josh is flown in with a possible penile fracture resulting from a canal barge accident, and while his parents make jokes to try to lighten the atmosphere, the injury could have serious repercussions for his future. A man with an injured finger following a night of clubbing contemplates his upcoming gender reassignment therapy, which will include taking hormones, while an 80-year-old with terminal cancer arrives after collapsing at her home

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman whose defibrillator located inside her chest has just delivered an electric shock to her heart and is worried that shes having a heart attack. A man falls on his driveway, resulting in a massive swelling over his eye, and a patient who has recently had bowel surgery is worried that he may have an infection

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: Part one of two. Dramatised documentary recounting the life of the iconic Egyptian ruler. By the age of 21, Cleopatra had already seen her sister killed by their own father. She became queen of Egypt before escaping almost certain death. Outcast from the royal family and knowing she had nothing to lose, so set about seducing Julius Caesar to ensure the survival of both her dynasty and Egypt itself

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: Part two of two. Dramatised documentary revealing the story of the iconic Egyptian rulers fall from grace in Egypt after the death of Julius Caesar. Plus, how Cleopatra tried to win the heart of Mark Antony, which turned out to be a fatal decision

programme.title: Cleopatra: Portrait of a Killer
programme.desc: Following the discovery of a skeleton that archaeologists believe to be the sister of Cleopatra VII, Neil Oliver examines the reign of the ruthless queen. On a journey taking him from Egypt to Turkey, he unravels the story behind the monarchs lust for power and the possible cause of her siblings death

programme.title: Egypts Lost Queens
programme.desc: Professor Joann Fletcher explores what it was like to be a woman of power in ancient Egypt, examining four of the civilisations most powerful female rulers through a wealth of spectacular buildings, personal artefacts and amazing tombs. As well as the women who held the title of pharaoh, many others played key roles in running the state and shaping every aspect of life

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: On Friday, May 19, 1536, Henry VIIIs second wife Anne Boleyn became the first British queen to be executed, but the circumstances of her death remain shrouded in mystery and contradiction. Hilary Mantel, Philippa Gregory and David Starkey are among the leading authors and historians sifting through the evidence to determine why Henry had her killed

programme.title: Agatha Christie: 100 Years of Poirot and Miss Marple
programme.desc: To mark the 100th anniversary of the publication of Agatha Christies first novel The Mysterious Affair at Styles, this documentary looks at the crime writers life and 10 of her most famous books, including Murder on the Orient Express and Death on the Nile. First shown in 2020

programme.title: Agatha Christies England
programme.desc: Retracing the English writer Agatha Christies footsteps across England, exploring some of the real places that inspired her fictional works. With access to both her family and those who knew her best, the programme looks back at how Agatha drew on her surroundings, and how the people and places she encountered found themselves immortalised in her extraordinary canon of work

programme.title: The Remarkable Miss North
programme.desc: Emilia Fox tells the story of how Victorian rebel Marianne North changed the face of botanical research, propelling her to the top of a male-dominated world of science and exploration. With exclusive access to Kew Gardens and Mariannes wealth of personal memoirs, letters and paintings, this is a tale of a visionary who rejected marriage and social convention for a pioneering life of conservation and adventure

programme.title: Hidden Letters
programme.desc: Following two millennial Chinese women connected by their fascination with the secret language of Nushu, a centuries-old hidden language that bonded generations of Chinese women in a clandestine support system of sisterhood, hope and survival. Influenced by Nushu?s legacy of female solidarity, the two women struggle to find balance as they forge their own paths in a patriarchal culture

programme.title: Agatha Christie: 100 Years of Poirot and Miss Marple

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family, Duty, Power
programme.desc: An exploration of the US presidential familys internal dynamics, including the influential matriarchs, sibling ambitions and competitive spirit that drove them to power. After returning from war, George HW Bush was reunited with his sweetheart Barbara. They married and had their first child - another future president

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving film footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. The first episode features footage of Queen Victorias state funeral in 1901 and a bicycle parade celebrating the coronation of the new king. The programme also examines life for people employed in the mining and cotton industries, as well as how an increase in leisure time led to the the popularity of seaside resorts soaring, with Blackpool leading the way

programme.title: Victorian Britain on Film
programme.desc: Documentary offering a unique window into a bygone era when a thrilling new invention, the motion picture camera, first captured a nation on film. Most of these films have been transformed by colourising them for the first time. They offer a rare portrait of a powerful and prosperous nation - and Empire - on the cusp of great change

programme.title: Besieged Fortresses, Legendary Battles
programme.sub-title: The Daunting Fortress of Richard the Lionheart
programme.desc: How fortresses redefined the art of warfare, illustrated with the aid of CGI, dramatised scenes and contributions by key experts. The first programme details the daunting fortress of Richard the Lionheart - a story of an amazing feat of medieval military construction

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving film footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. The first episode features footage of Queen Victorias state funeral in 1901 and a bicycle parade celebrating the coronation of the new king. The programme also examines life for people employed in the mining and cotton industries, as well as how an increase in leisure time led to the the popularity of seaside resorts soaring, with Blackpool leading the way

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family, Duty, Power
programme.desc: An exploration of the US presidential familys internal dynamics, including the influential matriarchs, sibling ambitions and competitive spirit that drove them to power. After returning from war, George HW Bush was reunited with his sweetheart Barbara. They married and had their first child - another future president

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving film footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. The first episode features footage of Queen Victorias state funeral in 1901 and a bicycle parade celebrating the coronation of the new king. The programme also examines life for people employed in the mining and cotton industries, as well as how an increase in leisure time led to the the popularity of seaside resorts soaring, with Blackpool leading the way

programme.title: Hidden Letters
programme.desc: Following two millennial Chinese women connected by their fascination with the secret language of Nushu, a centuries-old hidden language that bonded generations of Chinese women in a clandestine support system of sisterhood, hope and survival. Influenced by Nushu?s legacy of female solidarity, the two women struggle to find balance as they forge their own paths in a patriarchal culture

programme.title: Victorian Britain on Film
programme.desc: Documentary offering a unique window into a bygone era when a thrilling new invention, the motion picture camera, first captured a nation on film. Most of these films have been transformed by colourising them for the first time. They offer a rare portrait of a powerful and prosperous nation - and Empire - on the cusp of great change

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family, Duty, Power
programme.desc: An exploration of the US presidential familys internal dynamics, including the influential matriarchs, sibling ambitions and competitive spirit that drove them to power. After returning from war, George HW Bush was reunited with his sweetheart Barbara. They married and had their first child - another future president

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving film footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. The first episode features footage of Queen Victorias state funeral in 1901 and a bicycle parade celebrating the coronation of the new king. programme.title: Victorian Britain on Film
programme.desc: Documentary offering a unique window into a bygone era when a thrilling new invention, the motion picture camera, first captured a nation on film. Most of these films have been transformed by colourising them for the first time. They offer a rare portrait of a powerful and prosperous nation - and Empire - on the cusp of great change

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Northern Ireland
programme.sub-title: It Wasnt Like a Movie Anymore
programme.desc: Stories of the Troubles from people on all sides of the conflict, beginning by looking at how the situation in Northern Ireland in the late-1960s deteriorated from a time of relative peace. As the civil rights movement gained pace, demanding equal rights for Catholics, the Provisional IRA came to the fore, causing the British Army to be deployed. With the situation compounded by tactical mistakes, soldiers quickly found themselves caught up in violent clashes - leading to 13 unarmed Catholics being shot dead by British paratroopers in Derry on what becomes known as Bloody Sunday

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes
programme.sub-title: Are We at the Tipping Point?
programme.desc: Maiya May journeys across the United States to explore climate tipping points. Discovering how critical climate systems are for the planet?s stability, and learning the science behind these changes

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family, Duty, Power
programme.desc: An exploration of the US presidential familys internal dynamics, including the influential matriarchs, sibling ambitions and competitive spirit that drove them to power. After returning from war, George HW Bush was reunited with his sweetheart Barbara. They married and had their first child - another future president

programme.title: The Invention of Surgery
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Human Body
programme.desc: Exploring the history of surgery from its rudimentary conception centuries ago up to the modern specialist procedures that take place today. Beginning with a look at the risks people took to understand the human anatomy, how they managed to control human blood flow and how French king Louis XIV helped surgery become a recognised science. Part one of two

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and his team of experts meet Liz from Dorset who brings in a crumbling cast-iron gate built by her brother as a gift for her and her late husband. Horologist Steve Fletcher and leather expert Suzie Fletcher are brought a century-old watch by Nancy whos father was awarded the watch for his bravery on his return from the First World War. Upholsterer Sonnaz Nooranvary takes on a rocking chair that has been at the heart of Annas family home for decades and is in desperate need of some TLC. Last into the shop is Ruth and her Auntie Roz who bring in a penny arcade game from the 1920s

programme.title: The Repair Shop

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First into the Repair Shop is Alison who brings with her an 1890s ventriloquists puppet called George. The puppet helped Alison grow in confidence and gave her an outlet for her undiagnosed dyslexia as a child but hes now broken both inside and out. Organ-restorer David Burville brings Kirsten Ramsay and the teddy bear ladies to help restore George to his former glory. Lewys from Wales brings in a brass cornet dating back to 1897 that has passed through generations of his family. What once filled his home with music is now completely unplayable, instrument expert Pete Woods gets to work. Nick from Somerset brings in the broken remains of a Roman-style chair that belonged to his late father Richard for upholsterer Sonnaz Nooranvary to repair. Book-restorer Chris Shaw is tasked with fixing up a notebook that once belonged to Kats grandmother Mildred in the 1940s

What once filled his home with music is now completely unplayable, instrument expert Pete Woods gets to work. Nick from Somerset brings in the broken remains of a Roman-style chair that belonged to his late father Richard for upholsterer Sonnaz Nooranvary to repair. Book-restorer Chris Shaw is tasked with fixing up a notebook that once belonged to Kats grandmother Mildred in the 1940s

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew and Tee travel to four extraordinary locations across Northern Italy, including the countrys most famed antique markets and a dreamy Tuscan villa

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew and Tee go hunting for antiques in the homes of fellow dealers. Tucked away in the Cotswolds, Drew finds an ancient Greek masterpiece from 100BC

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Ricks start to the season only gets worse when he finds his truck has been ransacked. Plus, the Dirt Dogs ambush a gold thief and their chances of a profit takes a hit

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Gold Gypsies get to work to reach their ambitious target, while desperate to get back on track, Rick takes a gamble and heads to an old mining town

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Arusha Irvine and David Harper hunt for antiques in Lincolnshire and Hull, coming back with a door knocker, a chocolate elephant mould, and a pair of opera glasses

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus and the team clear out a farmhouse in Cumbria. They uncover some wonderful antiques, including a box of collectable toy cars and a 19th century bureau

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First into the Repair Shop is Alison who brings with her an 1890s ventriloquists puppet called George. The puppet helped Alison grow in confidence and gave her an outlet for her undiagnosed dyslexia as a child but hes now broken both inside and out. Organ-restorer David Burville brings Kirsten Ramsay and the teddy bear ladies to help restore George to his former glory. Lewys from Wales brings in a brass cornet dating back to 1897 that has passed through generations of his family. What once filled his home with music is now completely unplayable, instrument expert Pete Woods gets to work. Nick from Somerset brings in the broken remains of a Roman-style chair that belonged to his late father Richard for upholsterer Sonnaz Nooranvary to repair. Book-restorer Chris Shaw is tasked with fixing up a notebook that once belonged to Kats grandmother Mildred in the 1940s

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry Cole and motorcycle restorer Sam Lovegrove head to Herefordshire, where they discover sheds full of engines, autogyros and weird and wonderful vehicles of all kinds, before coming away with a British classic

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove drive on to Gloucestershire to uncover some oily treasure. They find a picturesque farm where deer, goats and pigs rub shoulders with vintage agricultural equipment. But can they make a quick return on todays find?

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Fuzz head to Northamptonshire to look around Louis palatial shed which is filled with motorbikes and some tempting automobilia

programme.title: Shed and Buried

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: A huge haul of designer watches sets pulses racing on auction day. Angus helps a woman sell some antiques her late father meticulously restored

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: A Statue of Liberty, an engine order telegraph and a broken fruit machine go under Anguss gavel as he helps a couple slim their wacky collection

programme.sub-title: Reunited after Seven Years: Phil Serrell and Catherine Southon - Day One
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Phil Serrell take their first road trip together in seven years, this time motoring through the West Country in their red Morgan Roadster

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mystery Treen and Badges of Honour

programme.desc: Henry and Fuzz find a Triumph Terrier in Oxfordshire. Can they breathe life into this little legend and get it back on the road?

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present the stories of a womans quest to discover her identity, and another searching for the sister she always wanted. programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actress Anna Maxwell Martin researches her family tree. Travelling to the small town in Northern Ireland where her father grew up, her understanding of her grandparents - who suffered a heartbreaking family tragedy - is turned on its head. On her mothers side, Anna starts with her grandfather Maxwell, whose name she added to her own to create her stage name. Looking into his childhood, she uncovers a dark history of domestic abuse and family separation. However, she also discovers extraordinary familial solidarity and love that changed the pattern for the generations that followed

programme.desc: The greatest hits of the 1980s and some surprises too.

programme.title: Shine on Harvey Moon
programme.desc: Rita is offered a posh Mayfair home when Nans flat is found to be unsafe, and Harvey has a romantic evening in the country

programme.title: The Fenn Street Gang
programme.desc: Mrs Abbott exerts her authority over Frankie one too many times, whe he goes off with his new girlfriend Celeste to the registry office.

programme.title: Agony
programme.desc: Reconciled with Laurence and heavily pregnant, Jane decides to quit her jobs at the magazine and radio show to spend more time at home. Sitcom, starring Maureen Lipman and Simon Williams

programme.title: Press Gang
programme.desc: Spikes intelligence is highlighted when the team tackle a complex story.

programme.title: Hank the Cowboy
programme.desc: Francis Coudrill presents a unique blend of animation and the European Western in this TV classic as Hank Rides Again

programme.title: Discovering Gardens
programme.desc: Gyles Brandreth and Michele Brown explore stunning public gardens across South West England in this fun, informative series-perfect for beginners and expert gardeners alike.

programme.title: Jack Hargreaves Old Country
programme.desc: Jack celebrates rural England, blending folklore, crafts, and storytelling as he explores vanishing traditions, landscapes, and the quiet wisdom of country life.

programme.title: Drop the Dead Donkey

programme.title: Drop the Dead Donkey
programme.desc: Gus tries to replace Alex with someone more appropriate following his departure to a new job, and Dave and Henry give several candidates incorrect interview advice

programme.title: A Clock Work Blue (1972)
programme.desc: A bumbling researcher is hurled through time, stumbling into the sensual secrets and erotic escapades that shaped civilizations wildest moments

programme.title: CB Hustlers (1976)
programme.desc: Truck drivers help each other avoid the police by communicating on their CB radios to create roadblocks. Action adventure, starring John Alderman

programme.title: Stereo Underground
programme.desc: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.

programme.title: We Had One of Those
programme.desc: Alex Dyke learns about another popular car from our past when he visits the National Motor Museum at Beaulieu.

programme.title: Wish Me Luck
programme.desc: Kit gets a shock when he returns to Le Crest, while Faith and Gordon devise a plan that will help them receive American assistance

programme.title: Drop the Dead Donkey
programme.desc: Alex faces the fallout from the office party after spending the night with Dave, and George finds himself asleep in a railway station

programme.title: These Sacred Vows
programme.desc: Having come on holiday to learn English, Elodie is forced to deal with the crazy Irish family who are hosting her as it seems Sandra, Jerry, and Karen are each hiding something that is making them implode - with Elodie caught in the middle. To make matters worse, she has an issue with her mum back home in France and an interaction with an older wedding guest that leaves her shaken

programme.title: Gosford Park (2001)
programme.desc: A weekend shooting party at a country estate is disrupted by a murder. As the numerous guests deal with their own personal agendas, their actions are quietly observed by their servants, notably an inquisitive maid, who drink in the scandalous gossip while maintaining their own strict social hierarchy. Robert Altmans period drama, starring Maggie Smith, Helen Mirren, Kelly Macdonald, Michael Gambon, Clive Owen and Kristin Scott Thomas

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Sidney is woken in the early hours by a fire in the village and, putting his life on the line, races to rescue Marion Taylor from the burning house, much to the relief of her husband Dominic. But there are questions surrounding the blaze - was it really an accident, and why was Marion so reluctant to leave? Normally Sidney would turn to Geordie to help solve a mystery like this, but he finds the detective is far from his usual self. When Dominic is then found stabbed to death, its Geordies junior, Atkins, who is sent to head up the case - and hes not exactly a fan of interfering vicars

programme.title: Home of the Year
programme.desc: Amanda Bone, Siobhán Lam and original judge Hugh Wallace - who sadly died after filming this latest series was completed - return with another search for breathtaking homes, from reimagined semi-detached houses to architectural new builds. They begin with three properties in Kildare, Wicklow and Dublin

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: On a moor outside of Shipton Abbott, a woman is found face down on the ground, with an arrow through her shoulder. The victim, Niamh Kirby, didnt see her attacker, and theres no trace of their presence or weapon at the scene. As the team digs deeper, a feud between Niamh and her brother-in-law is uncovered, which may or may not be relevant. Meanwhile, Anne dives into the planning of the wedding, but Humphrey and Martha worry that she might be a little too invested in their fairy-tale ceremony after her recent romantic entanglements. Drama, starring Kris Marshall, Sally Bretton and Barbara Flynn

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (1974)
programme.desc: An American businessman travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris tries to hire Hercule Poirot to discover the source of the death threats that have been made against him. The sleuth refuses, but wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow - and there is no shortage of suspects among the passengers. Agatha Christie mystery, starring Albert Finney, Lauren Bacall, Ingrid Bergman, Sean Connery and Vanessa Redgrave

programme.title: Nationwide
programme.desc: Anne Cassin presents the first of two programmes to mark National Tree Week. She visits Powerscourt Gardens in County Wicklow, home to a wide variety of beautiful and distinctive trees, planted by generations of gardeners over the past two centuries. The team also travels to Dublins Liberties to hear the story of a remarkable centuries?old pear tree that continues to thrive in the heart of the city

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Under pressure from the gang to get rid of the informant, Mark searches for Ravi before finding him at the Boxing Den. Lauren worries about her future, as news reaches her that the car lot is up for sale, and Phil avoids a situation

programme.title: Scealta na Lochanna
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the beauty, history, culture and wildlife of Lough Neagh and Lough Corrib, reflecting on the impact humans are having on their ecology

programme.title: Saol na Feirme

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: Goodman: Too Big to Fail
programme.desc: From sudden collapse to improbable comeback - the concluding part of the documentary reveals how Larry Goodman fought his way through financial ruin, political firestorms and public controversy to reclaim his empire and his seat at the head of the table

programme.title: Swindlers
programme.sub-title: Custom House Capital: A House of Cards
programme.desc: The Custom House Capital scandal, one of Irelands most notorious investment frauds, which involved the systematic misappropriation of approximately 61 million euros in client funds. The fallout left more than 2,000 investors, many of whom were retirees, facing devastating financial losses. This documentary allows many of them to tell their stories about how their trust was breached, leaving them facing retirement with just a fraction of their life savings

programme.title: The Dry
programme.desc: Emotions are running high on the day of the house auction - Bernie is distraught at Shivs impending departure, Ant is depressed and Tom is sick from nerves. As the auction gets under way, Ant begins to regret his involvement and comes up with a plan to thwart the sale. Meanwhile, Caroline struggles to cope with her pregnancy alone

programme.title: North Circular
programme.desc: Exploring the history, music and streetscapes of Dublins North Circular Road from the Phoenix Park to Dublin Port, a street that links some of the countrys most beloved and infamous places. programme.title: Monarch of the Glen

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Siegfried has the bright idea of bringing in an experienced bookkeeper, Miss Harbottle, to bring method to the madness of the practice. Shes certainly efficient, but the cracks soon start to show - and a sick ferret only makes matters worse. Farmer Dakin is very attached to his injured, elderly cow, but Siegfried advises letting the animal go, while James and Helen arrive at a long-awaited decision

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Patagonia at the foot of the South American continent, a beautiful and rugged land of mountains, ice and endless wild grasslands, His journey takes him up to the huge South Patagonian ice field, through the foothills of the Andes towards the great Grey Glacier of eastern Chile. In Taibo and Jauny, Simon encounters two gauchos, the cowboys of South America, who live isolated lives in the mountains, tending their livestock and braving the storms in a simple hut for months on end

programme.title: Smart Swarms
programme.desc: Documentary studying the behaviour of wildlife operating within swarms, from a giant flock of starlings to ant nests, beehives, a shoal of sardines and ladybird colonies

programme.title: The Future of Nature
programme.desc: Glimpse into grasslands where the biggest animal numbers are found, and see how animal life helps to draw down carbon

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The tale of one of the largest dinosaurs ever to walk the Earth, a colossal, long-necked lusotitan. Living 150 million years ago on an island known as the Iberian Mesta, now in Portugal, this 25-metre-long titan dwarfs every other dinosaur in the region. Yet his intimidating size is only part of the story. His ultimate goal is to win over a female and secure his legacy. Narrated by Bertie Carvel

programme.title: The Cleaner
programme.desc: Wicky is called to a remote and windswept lighthouse off the coast of Ireland. The keepers mate has been lost at sea, so Wicky has to clean up his personal belongings. It should be an easy enough gig for Wicky, whos looking forward to commune with nature a bit. However, the island is riddled with hostile seagulls and mysterious nautical legends - and home to grumpy lighthouse keeper Brennan, who insists that dark and powerful forces are at work and that all is not what it seems. Dark comedy, starring Greg Davies, with Conleth Hill

programme.title: Life and Death Row
programme.desc: Documentary following the campaign to take Dallas man Ivan Cantu off death row, having been sentenced to death in 2001 for the murder of his cousin James Mosqueda and James fiancee Amy Kitchen. After protesting his innocence for almost 20 years, true crime podcast Cousins by Blood spawned a campaign that gained celebrity support and shed light on new evidence to force a new hearing - but the pressure grew when a date for his execution was set in January 2024

programme.title: D-Day: The Unheard Tapes

As dawn breaks, German defenders witness an armada of ships approaching the shore

Powerboat instructor Mike Weatherbee tries to enforce the laws of the sea, carpet-cleaner Dave Satchwill prepares to lead the towns popular ghost tour, and lone fisherman Dave Brown reveals his unusual methods

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: August arrives and the fishermen of Brixham spend time ashore with their families as their boats are repaired - but summer proves costly for Jan, who loses £1,000 for every day his vessel is out of action.
