programme.desc: As Detective Alcaras investigates Milos disappearance, Marissa and Jenny work to raise awareness and a press conference turns ugly. Mystery thriller starring Sarah Snook

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Following his lover Brandons murder, Omar is determined to help the police bring Barksdale to justice and agrees to testify in the Gant trial. Meanwhile, Major Rawls puts pressure on Bunk to make arrests in the three unsolved cases he is investigating, forcing McNulty, Greggs and Freamon to ask Daniels for more time and preserve the wiretap on the Barksdale crew

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Sookie struggles with her emotions when the serial killer strikes close to home. Jason finds the urge for vampire blood hard to bear, eventually lashing out at his sister in his lowest moment. Elsewhere, Sam and Tara find comfort in each others loneliness. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin, Stephen Moyer and Ryan Kwanten

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion is sent out to welcome a royal party from Dorne outside the walls of Kings Landing, and Jon Snow finds himself on trial at Castle Black over his time with the wildlings and the death of Qhorin Halfhand. Daenerys heads toward the slave city of Meereen, and Arya runs into a familiar face. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, the day of King Joffreys wedding to Margaery Tyrell arrives, and while the sadistic monarch delights in tormenting his uncle Tyrion, the capitals various factions plot further alliances. However, all attention is drawn back to Joffrey following the arrival of a pie filled with live birds. Meanwhile, Melisandre oversees a sacrifice to the Lord of Light at Dragonstone as three traitors are burned at the stake, and the future continues to look grim for Theon as Ramsay Snow finds a use for him. North of the Wall, Bran sees clearly where he and his friends must go after experiencing a series of visions

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Ser Dontos spirits Sansa out of Kings Landing and rows her out to a waiting ship, and Pod gives Tyrion news of his forthcoming trial. Tywin counsels Tommen on what makes a good king and also has an offer for Oberyn Martell. Sam decides Castle Black is not a safe places for Gilly, while Jon proposes a bold plan after the wildlings send a chilling message. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys picks a champion to take on the best that Meereen has to offer and Davos has an idea about raising funds for Stanniss cause

programme.title: Risky Business (1983)
programme.desc: An upper-class suburban teenager gets involved with a prostitute while his parents are away on holiday, turning the family home into a brothel and jeopardising his plans for the future. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Tom Cruise, Rebecca De Mornay, Bronson Pinchot and Joe Pantoliano

programme.title: Singin in the Rain (1952)
programme.desc: A silent-movie star tries to win the heart of an aspiring actress as the introduction of sound changes the film business for ever. However, his frequent on-screen love interest does not take kindly to this real-life romance. Musical comedy, starring Gene Kelly, Debbie Reynolds, Donald OConnor, Jean Hagen and Millard Mitchell. Songs include Make em Laugh, You Are My Lucky Star and the title number

programme.title: The Blues Brothers (1980)
programme.desc: Two criminal brothers discover the orphanage where they were raised faces closure unless the nuns who run it can pay their tax bill, so the pair embark on an urgent mission to revive their old blues band to raise the money needed. Comedy, starring John Belushi, Dan Aykroyd, Aretha Franklin, James Brown, Ray Charles, Cab Calloway, Carrie Fisher, John Candy and John Lee Hooker

programme.title: May December (2023)
programme.desc: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance gripped the nation, a married couple buckles under pressure when an actress arrives to do research for a film about their past. Director Todd Haynes drama, starring Natalie Portman, Chris Tenzis and Julianne Moore

programme.title: About a Boy (2002)
programme.desc: An idle womaniser pretends to be a father to meet women in a single mothers group - but he starts to change his selfish ways when a lonely youngster with a depressed mum becomes emotionally attached to him. Romantic comedy adapted from Nick Hornbys novel, starring Hugh Grant, Toni Collette, Nicholas Hoult and Rachel Weisz

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: A single woman begins a new year with resolutions to find love, quit her bad habits and take a step up the career ladder. Her plans crumble as she tries to deal with her mothers infidelity, get over a passionate fling with her boss and come to terms with her feelings for an uptight lawyer. Romantic comedy based on Helen Fieldings novel, starring Renee Zellweger, Hugh Grant and Colin Firth

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. However, when the couple start to squabble over their personal habits, she decides to decamp for a while to Thailand and write a travelogue. Unfortunately, she has reckoned without the reappearance of a duplicitous old flame - and a spell behind bars in a Thai prison. Romantic comedy sequel, with Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Hugh Grant, Jim Broadbent and Gemma Jones

programme.title: Wicked (2024)
programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. Its the beginning of a friendship which culminates in an epic showdown as Elphaba transforms a renegade witch with a skill for bursting into show-stopping songs, like Defying Gravity. Part one of The Wizard of Oz prequel based on the hit stage musical, starring Cynthia Erivo, Ariana Grande-Butera, Jonathan Bailey, Michelle Yeoh and Jeff Goldblum

programme.title: Mamma Mia! (2008)
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughters wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan, Julie Walters, Colin Firth, Stellan Skarsgard and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: Love Actually (2003)
programme.desc: Ten interlinked stories of people searching for and finding love. While the newly elected, bachelor British prime minister is smitten by a junior staff member at 10 Downing Street, a heartbroken writer heads for France to get over a failed relationship, and a faded rock star aims to reinvent himself in time for Christmas. Richard Curtiss romantic comedy, with Hugh Grant, Martine McCutcheon, Emma Thompson, Alan Rickman, Colin Firth, Bill Nighy and Liam Neeson

programme.title: Yesterday (2019)
programme.desc: Jack, a struggling musician, gets hit by a bus during a mysterious event. When he regains consciousness, he finds that he is the only person who can remember the Beatles, and sets out to exploit the opportunity by passing their hits off as his own compositions. Danny Boyles comedy, starring Himesh Patel and Lily James

programme.title: The Blind Side (2009)
programme.desc: A middle-class family take in a hulking homeless teenager, who has no education or skills to speak of. The indomitable wife encourages him to turn his life around, helping him to get the grades he needs for a college scholarship and hone his sporting skills to become an American football player. Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw

programme.title: I, Tonya (2017)
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespies comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance

programme.title: Mamma Mia! (2008)
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughters wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. Danny Boyles comedy, starring Himesh Patel and Lily James

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes (2009)
programme.desc: The eccentric detective and his confidant Dr Watson investigate the apparent resurrection of a criminal mastermind with links to the occult, who is carrying out a series of seemingly magical murders. The case is complicated by the reappearance of Holmes duplicitous old flame Irene Adler. Action thriller, starring Robert Downey Jr, Jude Law, Rachel McAdams, Mark Strong and Eddie Marsan

programme.title: Blade Runner (1982)
programme.desc: A former cop in a bleak future Los Angeles is forced to return to duty for a mission to hunt down and kill a group of renegade android replicants. The fugitives have escaped from a space colony to find their creator on Earth, in a bid to prolong their limited lifespan. Theatrical cut of Ridley Scotts sci-fi thriller, originally released in cinemas, starring Harrison Ford, Rutger Hauer, Sean Young and Daryl Hannah

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon (1975)
programme.desc: Hapless Sonny and his sidekick Sal have a plan to rob a Brooklyn bank. The novice crooks thought they would be in and out in 10 minutes, but instead find themselves stuck in an ongoing hostage situation, with the police and the media laying siege to the bank. Sidney Lumets fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino, John Cazale and Charles Durning.

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: Bone Lake (2024)
programme.desc: A couples holiday is upended when theyre forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation. Comedy thriller, starring Alex Roe and Maddie Hasson

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: One More Shot (2025)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time-travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan

programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

programme.title: Tina (2021)
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome. Following a prolonged period of ill health, Turner intends to retire from the spotlight with her second husband, Erwin Bach. She bids farewell to her fans in the emotional documentary Tina. Directed by Dan Lindsay and TJ Martin, the film invites the singer to reminisce about her turbulent life and career with glowing contributions from friends, family and fans including Oprah Winfrey and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Becoming Madonna
programme.desc: Documentary charting the singers rise to stardom, built around a cache of recently uncovered audio tapes in which a young Madonna reflects on her extraordinary life and career. Plus, rare footage, unseen photos and interviews with family, friends and collaborators

programme.title: Amy (2015)
programme.desc: Documentary portrait of soul, jazz and RnB singer-songwriter Amy Winehouse, whose untimely death in July 2011 followed a well-publicised history of drugs and alcohol abuse. Director Asif Kapadia traces Amys rise and demise over the 13 years preceding her death, telling her story via her music and autobiographical song lyrics, video footage shot by friends and family, archive television clips, plus voiceover interviews with those who were personally and professionally close to her. Contributors include Pete Doherty, Mitch Winehouse, Tony Bennett, Mark Ronson and Tyler James

programme.desc: A pseudoscientific theory embraced by the Nazis claimed their Aryan ancestors had sought refuge in the Himalayas during a mythical cataclysmic ice age. This prompted Himmler to initiate an SS mission to the mountains

programme.title: Commando Missions
programme.desc: Operation Frankton, of December 1942. The mission was for Royal Marines to place limpet mines on German ships in the occupied Bordeaux Harbour, 62 miles along the Gironde River. Five cockleshell canoes set off from submarine HMS Tuna at the mouth of the river. Only two reached the harbour and carried out the raid, escaping with the aid of the French Resistance. The damage to the ships and the resulting disruption to German supply lines had a significant impact on the war effort

programme.title: Instruments of Death
programme.sub-title: The English Civil War - The Battle of Naseby
programme.desc: Karl Ude-Martinez and Kevin Hicks explore how weapons and body armour were developed, beginning with a look at the impact of the 1645 Battle of Naseby during the English Civil War

programme.title: Instruments of Death
programme.sub-title: The Norman Invasion: The Battle of Hastings
programme.desc: Presenters Karl Ude-Martinez and Kevin Hicks continue their look at how weapons and body armour were developed, investigating the part played by Danish battle axes, Saxon shields and Norman lances during the Battle of Hastings in 1066

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do the Brits Win Every War?
programme.desc: The presenter is joined by Bruno Tonioli to look at key battle tactics during the Roman Invasion. The pair contemplate the physical diffixcult of invasion - such as wading through the waves in armour - and examine the power struggle the Celts went through to hold onto their identity, as well as the complexity of firing a catapult

programme.desc: Documentary shedding light on unusual discoveries made in the darkest places on Earth and venturing into the realm of the supernatural, where eerie and unsettling findings turn up unexplained phenomena that challenge mans understanding of the world. programme.desc: Part two of two. Professor Alice Roberts revisits the death of Queen Elizabeth I. programme.desc: Examining the execution of German spies captured in the two world wars. Theres a profile of suffragette Leonora Cohen, who took aim at the crown jewels to publicise her cause. In the Royal Armouries after dark, curator Bridget examines a telling reminder of the horrors of war. Plus, another new recruit joins the Beefeaters

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A bizarre trend happened in Ireland in the 1980s when thousands of people started seeing religious statues move. Some residents of a village reported seeing a statue of the Virgin Mary move. Others believed the phenomenon was just an optical illusion or a prank

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: According to folklore, pots of gold and wishes are granted if a Leprechaun is caught. These mysterious little creatures are seemingly only found in Ireland. Alleged sightings of leprechauns and fairies are nothing new in Ireland. In fact, many claim they are part of everyday life on the Emerald Isle. Experts debate whether these Celtic creatures are fact or fiction

programme.desc: Veterans and historians tell the story of the Thai-Burma railway and the countless prisoners of war and slave labourers who died building it

Some people believe that extraterrestrials instructed these complex structures be built. Presented by Giorgio Tsoukalos

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate the work of Nasa and secret government files relating to extraterrestrial activity, looking for proof of alien contact in the recent or distant past

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Investigating the reasons behind Nasas denials of UFO accounts and why the organisation has taken measures to prevent its astronauts from telling their stories

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Investigating beliefs held by some experts that many atmospheric light shows are actually caused by extraterrestrials

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the north Norfolk coast through one of the least developed spots in Britain, finding out how the area maintained its rural, remote identity despite the dynamic industrial changes of the Victorian age. From the arrival of Bertie, Prince of Wales at Sandringham House to the opening of Cromer Pier, Tonys four-day walk sees him learn about key periods in the countys history. He explores prime shooting estates, purpose-built seaside resorts, salt marshes and disused railway lines as he discovers how powerful landowners were able to control development and even shape the railways to suit their needs

programme.title: Instruments of Death
programme.sub-title: Queen Boudicas Revolt: The Battle of Watling Street
programme.desc: Military combat specialists Karl Ude-Martinez and Kevin Hicks investigate the British uprising against the Roman army, examining how swords, spears and body armour were developed. Plus, how battlefield wounds were treated on the frontlines

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A bizarre trend happened in Ireland in the 1980s when thousands of people started seeing religious statues move. Some residents of a village reported seeing a statue of the Virgin Mary move. Others believed the phenomenon was just an optical illusion or a prank

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: According to folklore, pots of gold and wishes are granted if a Leprechaun is caught. These mysterious little creatures are seemingly only found in Ireland. Alleged sightings of leprechauns and fairies are nothing new in Ireland. In fact, many claim they are part of everyday life on the Emerald Isle. Experts debate whether these Celtic creatures are fact or fiction

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Discovering the fate of the holiday industry in a post-apocalyptic world, with luxury resorts and cruise ships falling apart

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring anomalies appearing on satellite images to try and get a better understanding of unexplained phenomena

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective, telling how the Nazis conquered Germany and then half of Europe within a few years of losing the First World War. This first episode recounts how the clash of right-wing and left-wing political convictions turned the Weimar Republic into a powder keg. The fascist movement then seized power in Italy in 1922

programme.title: Combat Trains

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. In the first edition, five bodies dating from the Bronze Age are found in a deep pit on the Isle of Thanet in Kent. One of them is an old woman, who has been manipulated into a position where she is pointing at something. But at what? And why?

programme.title: Cracking the Code
programme.desc: How codes and ciphers have been used for millennia to send secret messages, hide identities and operate outside the law. This episode reveals the story of one of historys greatest codebreakers - suburban mother Elizebeth Friedman. Armed with just a pencil and paper, she cracked the codes that brought down the Mob, saved countless lives in the Second World War and prevented a Nazi invasion of America

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: The story of Britains first female agents sent to the front line during the Second World War and spymistress Vera Atkins, who led them. In the tumult of the conflict, French Resistance fighters sought aid from Britains Special Operations Executive (SOE) against Nazi occupation. Led by Romanian-born Atkins, SOE enlisted female agents including Odette Sansom and Noor Inayat Khan to take the fight to the Germans. As tensions soared, Noor navigated occupied France, while Atkins grappled with tough decisions. She and her team raced against time to safeguard SOEs mission, braving sacrifices for victory

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: The story of Britains first female agents sent to the front line during the Second World War and spymistress Vera Atkins, who led them. In the face of danger, Vera ramped up her recruitment of female agents. Chaos ensued as the Prosper circuit in Paris neared collapse. Meanwhile, Noor, deep in Parisian resistance, struggled to maintain cover. Vera enlisted agents like Violette Szabo and Yvonne Baseden, but uncertainty shrouds their upcoming missions

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Amid the chaos of D-Day, alarming wireless messages revealed Special Operations Executive (SOE) disloyalty. While concerns escalated, Allied troops advanced and Paris was liberated. SOE operations subsequently dwindled, prompting Second World War spymistress Vera Atkins to confront the harm done to her agents

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: While Europe rejoiced over victory in the Second World War, Odette Hallowes struggle at Ravensbruck revealed telling information about other agents in prison. Spymistress Vera Atkins investigation intensified in Karlsruhe prison and Ravensbruck, focusing on espionage agent Noor Inayat Khans fate

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Assigned to the British War Crime Investigation Unit in post-war Germany, British intelligence officer Vera Atkins pursued her agents fate at Natzweiler and Ravensbruck. Piecing together testimonies, she insisted on obtaining official records to substantiate her findings for upcoming trials. While Vera sought justice for her girls, a letter challenged her verdicts on Noor?s fate. Suspicions of double agents led Vera to hunt down a Nazi mastermind. She was still to determine whether any agents had escapeed, and if not who had betrayed them

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: How the capture of a key Nazi uncovered shocking realities. Amid demands for accountability, spymistress Vera Atkins and her team had to navigate murky waters to confront uncomfortable truths

programme.title: Queens of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Ancient Egyptian queens who have shaped history, featuring an assessment of their enduring legacies. This programme looks at the life of Queen Tiye, wife of the Egyptian pharaoh Amenhotep III and mother of pharaoh Akhenaten

programme.title: Queens of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The great Cleopatra VII was not the only Egyptian queen to bear that name. This programme explores the shocking story of two other Cleopatras, who ruled Egypt jointly with Ptolemy VIII - a grim tale of incest, murder, rape, mutilation and war

programme.title: Queens of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The untold story of Cleopatra Selene, the little-known daughter of Mark Antony and Cleopatra VII. After her parents suicide, Cleopatras daughter looked destined for death or obscurity. However, she recovered her fortunes to become one of Africas greatest queens

programme.desc: From the Hindenburg disaster to Krakatoas violent volcanic eruption in 1883, these explosions are among historys deadliest

programme.desc: From a man blasted by a high-pressure air hose to a lumberjack who survived near decapitation, these accidents border on the impossible

programme.sub-title: New Zealand and the Bass Strait

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under

programme.desc: Alice Roberts joins archaeologists on digs of northern Britain, revealing a Roman Emperors lost bath house, the sunken treasures of medieval pilgrims and a formidable fortress perched on top of a Scottish mountain

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards takes an aerial and up-close view of some of the UKs most awe-inspiring castles. Beginning at Fyvie Castle in Scotland, Rick meets Annie Robertson, who faces the task of saving the childhood home of Charles I from collapse

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to the south-east of England to explore the turbulent history of Dover Castle. He reveals that Henry II ordered its construction not only as a statement of royal power, but also out of guilt for the murder of Thomas Becket, the Archbishop of Canterbury, in 1170. Dan discovers how a vast network of tunnels was used to defend the castle, including underground barracks built during the Napoleonic Wars and a nuclear bunker created during the Cold War

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of the Tower of London, which is one of Britains most famous buildings and has been a military fortress, a palace, a royal mint, a prison, a zoo and a place of execution. He reveals how one kings obsession with money led to the Tower becoming the focus of the worst Jewish massacre the country had ever seen and explains how a mob of disgruntled peasants managed to break through its defences as they sought bloody revenge for taxes they could no longer put up with

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Warwick Castle, which started as a motte and bailey fort established by William the Conqueror in 1068 and was transformed into a stone fortress two centuries later by the Beauchamp family. He examines the role Guy Beauchamp played in the kidnapping and murder of one of Edward IIs closest allies and descends into the castles claustrophobic dungeon

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to Gwynedd to explore the history of Caernarfon Castle, the building of which began in 1283 on the orders of Edward I. He demonstrates how the castles vast stone walls and strategically designed towers repelled all enemies, even the Welsh national hero Owain Glyndwr, earning itself a truly forbidding reputation, but its military importance faded at the end of the 15th century when Henry Tudor - a Welshman - made his way on to the English throne

programme.title: American Pickers

However, things start to unravel when she reveals how many men she has slept with - a list that includes Homer and Aerosmith drummer Joey Krammer

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist concludes his exploration of the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, by examining plants that have evolved to minimise their dependence on water, enabling them to survive in the worlds driest environments. He witnesses a cactus blooming at midnight, tells the story of the spectacular flowering of the Agave franzosinii, and visits the Millennium Seed Bank, a facility designed to save plants from future extinction

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns hires the Simpsons to play his live-in virtual reality family, but excludes Homer so that he can play the role of father. Homer, feeling all alone, finds a new best friend in girl-next-door Julia, who eats, drinks and thinks like him

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist and film-maker explores the many varieties of plant life housed at the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, and explains what they reveal about the natural world and the development of life on Earth. He begins inside the establishments Palm House, whose climate has been engineered to simulate conditions found in rainforests, charting the evolution of plants that grow in the worlds wettest regions and investigating how flowering plants spread across the globe so rapidly

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist explores how the plants at Kew Gardens change through the seasons and demonstrates the surprising properties of several species, including the predatory pond-dwelling bladderwort utricularia and a fungus that appears to be capable of mind control. He also discusses the largest single organism on the planet, visits the worlds biggest flower and explains how plants and insects can communicate using scents and music

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist concludes his exploration of the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, by examining plants that have evolved to minimise their dependence on water, enabling them to survive in the worlds driest environments. He witnesses a cactus blooming at midnight, tells the story of the spectacular flowering of the Agave franzosinii, and visits the Millennium Seed Bank, a facility designed to save plants from future extinction

programme.title: Shark: British Isles Special with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Naturalist Steve Backshall goes in search of some of the 30-plus shark species that inhabit waters of the British Isles, showing how the big fish in home waters are just as astonishing and mysterious as their global cousins. Along the way he encounters a four-ton basking shark near the Hebrides and dives with his favourite of all time, the blue shark, off the coast of Cornwall. He also meets scientists and conservationists in Wales who are working to protect endangered species

programme.title: Thelma (2024)
programme.desc: After 93-year-old Thelma is conned by a phone scammer, she embarks on a risky journey across LA with only one thing on her mind - revenge. Comedy, starring June Squibb, Fred Hechinger, Parker Posey, Clark Gregg and in one of his final films, Richard Roundtree

programme.title: Promising Young Woman (2020)
programme.desc: Medical-school dropout Cassie is traumatised by a tragic event in her past. Still living with her parents, and waiting tables at a cheap coffee shop to earn a living, she has found the perfect way to deal with the painful past, and seeks vengeance against those who crossed her path. Director Emerald Fennells Oscar-winning crime thriller, starring Carey Mulligan, Bo Burnham and Alison Brie

programme.desc: A group of teens learn to love their bodies through inclusive fashion design and friendship. Writer/director Claire Ayoubs comedy drama, starring Mia Kaplan, Jemima Yevu and Rainn Wilson

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

American airman Steve Trevor crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in an attempt to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Director Patty Jenkins blockbusting fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

Action adventure based on the video game, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Raul Julia, Kylie Minogue and Ming-Na Wen

programme.desc: A battle-hardened special forces operative attempts to rescue his kidnapped niece when a mercenary mission spirals into chaos. Action thriller, starring Eden Brolin, Andy Garcia and Melissa Leo

programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

Action adventure spin-off, starring Dwayne Johnson, Jason Statham, Idris Elba and Helen Mirren

Sci-fi thriller, starring Will Smith, Alice Braga and Charlie Tahan

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Road Crime Unit officers are flagged down in Plymouth when a member of the public is suspected of having a heart attack, and dog handler Lee deals with two separate incidents involving men armed with knives. programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are called out to an apparent suicide, but come to different initial conclusions as to whether Theresa Esperna actually killed herself or was murdered. Further investigation reveals that she worked at a bank whose only client was the Catholic Church and her specific role was to manage the trust fund set up to pay compensation settlements in sexual abuse cases involving priests. Crime drama, starring Kathryn Erbe and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A programmer working for a defence contractors cyberwarfare department falls to his death from an apartment building. Goren and Eames discover he was a hacker secretly employed by a rival company under a false identity, and a woman claiming to be a friend of the victim says they were actually on a mission to destroy both businesses. Guest starring Michael Kelly (House of Cards) and Jeri Ryan (Body of Proof)

programme.title: Grand Tours of Scotland
programme.sub-title: In Search of the Real Scotland
programme.desc: Paul Murton boards the Jacobite steam train to make one of the worlds most famous railways journeys, with his route starting at the foot of Ben Nevis in Fort William and continuing along to Mallaig and onwards to the Isle of Skye. For centuries, outsiders had seldom visited the beautiful landscape of the west coast, but then the power of steam changed everything and within a century, a network of railways spread across the entire country, connecting the industrial cities of the south to the mountains and glens of the north

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Newlywed couple Tessa and Robin juggle running a 48-bedroom castle and 50 acres of land with a special pair of Royal Highlander cows. In the auction room, a small but perfectly formed painting by one of the worlds most famous artists, John Constable, is ready for auction. Silver enthusiast Oliver desperately hopes that a late 19th-century Japanese silver punchbowl will be coming home with him, while auctioneer Michael needs to sell a 1930s Philco radio that props-buyer Bridie and her mother Sara have fallen in love with

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Egyptologist Dr Chris gets his hands on an inscribed Egyptian amulet and gives trainee auctioneer James a masterclass in ancient signs and symbols. programme.title: Country House Auction

programme.desc: Shiva Raichandanis film follows Asifa as she prepares to undergo gender affirmation surgery, and the trans activist reflects on how her life has changed during her transition

programme.title: Lion of the Desert (1980)
programme.desc: An uprising occurs in 1920s Libya against Italian fascist colonial rule. Mussolini personally assigns a sadistic general to use whatever means it takes to crush the revolt, leading to a bitter personal conflict between the colonisers and a rebel leader. Fact-based drama, starring Anthony Quinn, Oliver Reed, Rod Steiger and Irene Papas

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: The chef travels across the country to discover the secrets of planting, rearing livestock and growing vegetables to help him transform his smallholding. He begins by bringing in new livestock and his first addition are pigs, but he needs to choose animals that will provide him with the best possible meat

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Archaeologists Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn team up with historian Ruth Goodman as they move to Morwellham Quay in Devon and try to take the port - once one of Britains busiest - back to life as it was during its Edwardian heyday. They begin by setting up home in a cottage as they wait for the arrival of their first livestock, and set out to prepare the ground for cropping by making tons of quicklime fertiliser to neutralise the acidity of the soil

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques auctioneer Charles Hanson, trader Linda Lambert and luxury upcycler Zoe Pocock head to Cambridge to search for bargains, competing to make the most money

programme.desc: A restraining order, slashed tires and alleged theft come into play when ex friends call it quits.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: When a womans vehicle is repossessed, she tells the car salesmans wife that he made inappropriate passes at her.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: The Judge dispenses wise advice to a teen who is allegedly hanging out with pot-smoking, drinking friends; he is sued for damages from an icy-road crash.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Two women are caught on video chasing a man down in his place of business after he repossessed the car they bought.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A young mother confides in her landlord when things get rough with her live-in lover; he denies any illegal activity.

programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: After a young woman witnesses the murder of her pet chickens by a neighbours Husky, she draws a gun and kills the animal; neighbours deny its their dog.

programme.desc: While riding her scooter with a dog on either side, a woman claims the yapping of a neighbours small Shih-poo caused her to fall.

programme.desc: The Judge admonishes a young woman for sizing up a mechanic based on how nice he is; she sues him for allegedly substandard work, fraud and negligence.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman claims she was forced to move out of her boyfriends home because of the constant harassment by two of his ex-wives.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: When a man passes away, his family contests and nullifies his recent wedding and sues his partner for allegedly stolen property.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A businessman is left holding a 36-month lease when his assistant returns to her native country; a friend steps in but is sued for alleged car damage.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A landlord allegedly goes off on a frightened mother and child who quickly move out; the landlord claims they left lice and bedbugs behind.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.sub-title: Beyond the Shining Sea - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team are left stunned by another murder connected to the killing of festival queen Tiana. But there is a new lead - a phone call relating to their initial suspect - so DI Jack and his officers travel over to nearby Rosalie Island, where the owner and employees of a lucrative investment company all fall under suspicion as they are questioned about the mysterious call. Meanwhile, with emotions running high, Ruby encourages her uncle, Commissioner Patterson, to show his emotional side for once. Guest starring Angus Deayton and Saskia Reeves

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick uses controversial tactics to catch the killer of a teenage girl whose body has been found on a beach, even though his unorthodox approach risks jeopardising the entire investigation. Speculating that the victims surfer friends may be able to reveal the truth about how she died, he announces that he is going to hypnotise them in an attempt to jog their memories - but plans a cunning double bluff

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.sub-title: Rex, Drugs and Rock n Roll
programme.desc: When Jesses music teacher is killed at his recording studio, Charlie and Rex link the crime to a seemingly unrelated murder

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Lucy Lawless stars as Alexa Crowe, a former cop-turned-private investigator called upon to provide professional support and advice to ex-colleague and long-time friend Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey. In the opening instalment, she is lured into the world of murder and mystery when asked to look into the death of a woman who fell from the balcony of a male escort. Thriller, co-starring Bernard Curry

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A popular reggae band reunite after 30 years to perform on Saint Marie, but the joyous occasion is blighted when guitarist Billy Springer is found dead in his dressing room afterwards. With a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside, all evidence points toward suicide - but when the Commissioner reveals he received a message from the victim earlier in the day, the case becomes rather more complicated. Meanwhile, Dwayne struggles to come to terms with his dads surprise visit. Is it too late for them to make amends? With guest appearances by Ram John Holder, Suzanne Packer, Delroy Brown and Levi Roots

With guest appearances by Ram John Holder, Suzanne Packer, Delroy Brown and Levi Roots

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Lucy Lawless stars as Alexa Crowe, a former cop-turned-private investigator called upon to provide professional support and advice to ex-colleague and long-time friend Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey. In the opening instalment, she is lured into the world of murder and mystery when asked to look into the death of a woman who fell from the balcony of a male escort. Thriller, co-starring Bernard Curry

programme.desc: After a shocking death, Murdoch is convinced that someone close to Station House No 4 is involved

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore how certain British ingredients make traditional combinations, preparing a pork and apple dish and a pear and Stilton tart. They also find out how Yorkshire pudding was made in the 1700s, and discover it was not originally served with beef

programme.desc: The actor is joined by former Newcastle United striker Les Ferdinand for a short break in Northumberland, where the pair travel from Bamburgh to Seahouses on e-bikes

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the second half of the journey, Simon travels along the Black Sea Coast to the capital of Ankara and the Northern Highlands, witnessing first hand the aftermath of fighting in Kurdish areas and meeting a conservationist attempting to preserve the regions brown bears. He then returns to Istanbul, where he takes part in a popular TV series set in the palace of the Ottoman Sultans

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The first of two programmes in which the explorer travels through Cornwall as its emerges from the first lockdown, discovering the impact of Covid-19 on a part of the country highly reliant on tourism. Simon discovers the ongoing impact of the collapse of the tin-mining industry in the 1980s when he visits one of Britains poorest estates, and meets the entrepreneurs who sell homemade food on the beach who are struggling to make enough money to last the winter

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Documentary series following the investigations of unique specialist units within UK police forces created to crack tough cases ranging from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder. The night before Valentines Day, 2022, Thames Valley Police receive a 999 call reporting that someone has been attacked close to Banbury town centre - officers are dispatched and find that the victim is 40-year-old Keith Green, who is pronounced dead at the scene and an armed arrest unit conducts an immediate raid on two potentially dangerous suspects. With a possible murder on their doorstep, Thames Valley Major Crime Unit launch Operation Inuit and begin an intense investigation that unravels a love triangle and a killing motivated by twisted passion and male pride

Among the participants setting out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves are Clare Balding, Liz Bonnin, Jo Brand, Asim Chaudhry, Victoria Coren Mitchell, Greg Davies, Simon Day, Greg James, Guz Khan, Gabby Logan, Chris McCausland, Stephen Merchant, Kiri Pritchard-McLean, Angela Scanlon, John Simm, Ranj Singh, Henning Wehn, Claudia Winkleman and Lucy Worsley

programme.title: Hate Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: Jamali Maddix meets with Azov, a far-right militant group in Ukraine that has gained legitimacy despite its neo-Nazi roots

programme.title: Hate Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: Jamali Maddix embeds himself in the Nordic Youth, a group who patrol Swedens streets hunting refugees, to try to understand their response to a migration crisis

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: An unknown tagger begins to paint graffiti around London, and claims to have been responsible for killing a celebrated street artist four years previously. Originally part of a gang, the victim went solo after receiving support from a wealthy art patron, and when the detectives reopen the case, they become suspicious of his resentful former crew members. Meanwhile, Brian signs up to a social networking site as TopCop999 to chart the gritty life of a lawman, much to his colleagues displeasure

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Top television spy series Operation QT is filming at the convent when a real bullet is fired instead of a replica, narrowly missing the leading actor. Working with DS Livingstone, Sister Boniface soon works out the real target was the shows producer, Dick Lansky, who has many enemies on and off set and a roving eye for the actresses. Lorna Watson stars

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: As the bills pile up, Tracey has to consider selling Darryls car, while Sharon goes into the perfume business to raise some cash. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Queens of Mystery
programme.desc: Part one of two. When 1980s new wave band Volcanic Youth get together to record an album at a retreat not far from Wildermarsh, Cat is troubled due to her contentious break-up with the group years ago. Mattie is assigned the unglamorous job of searching for a lost dog, but the case is put on hold when one of the bands members turns up dead

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two of two. Garfield is determined to resolve where he stands with Jenny, and Quinnans strange actions arouse the suspicion of his colleagues

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: The stakes are high when Meadows goes undercover in a casino

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: When a plane makes a crash landing in Sun Hill, Dalys former lover looms large in the subsequent investigation

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A teenage girl claiming to have information regarding a mans violent death turns out to be Sergeant Boydens estranged daughter. Investigations prompt a thaw in their icy relationship, but there are more surprises in store for Sun Hills Mr Smooth. Tony OCallaghan and Sasha Pick star

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Skases pride takes a blow when he is abducted and robbed by a gang of teenage girls

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives return home after their trip to South Africa, to find Nonnatus House has come under new management. The formidable Sister Ursula (Harriet Walter) has taken charge and introduced some drastic changes to the way the clinic is run, which Sister Julienne, bound by her vow of obedience, is powerless to oppose. The midwives come to the aid of a victim of domestic violence whose husband is about to be released from prison, and who risks losing everything if she seeks a divorce. Sister Mary Cynthia suffers further anxiety attacks, and Patsy receives distressing news about her father

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Ursula insists the midwives do not become emotionally involved with their patients, but her harsh new approach proves hard to cope with in the face of two devastating cases. A father-to-be is badly injured in an explosion, leaving him unable to work to support his family, and a couple with dwarfism expecting their first child are warned that their child may be stillborn, a situation that leaves Patsy confronted with one of the hardest decisions of her life

programme.title: Catherine Cooksons Colour Blind
programme.desc: Drama from the best-selling author. Set between the wars, it concerns a girl who returns to her Tyneside home newly married to her black husband, only to encounter bigotry from all sides, to say nothing of her obsessed brothers animosity. Niamh Cusack, Tony Armatrading and Dearbhla Molloy star

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Four-part adaptation of Elizabeth Gaskells novel following the fortunes of Margaret Hale, a privileged middle-class southerner who is forced to settle in the northern town of Milton. Over time she grows accustomed to her new surroundings and her social conscience awakens as she befriends local mill workers, and discovers the poverty and workplace struggles they face. Daniela Denby-Ashe, Lesley Manville and Sinead Cusack star

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Thorntons family questions Margarets intentions when she intervenes in an industrial dispute at the mill. Marias health continues to deteriorate, and desperate to see her son Frederick one last time, she pens a letter to him in Spain, begging for his return. Drama based on the novel by Elizabeth Gaskell, starring Daniela Denby-Ashe and Richard Armitage

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: As Great Slaughters Quincentennial Celebrations near, Sister Helena is found dead in the chapel having been bludgeoned over the head

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Double bill. A rising star in the Essex police force is found beaten and shot in his burnt-out car in what proves to be an emotional case for his colleagues. The team helps DCI Jim Sullivan, the detective charged with bringing the killer to justice, and it isnt long before suspicion falls on Dean Fallon - a local drug dealer and the son of a known crime boss. But when he proves to have a solid alibi, the investigation shifts closer to home. Starring Emilia Fox and David Caves, with James Alexandrou and Jason Watkins

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Jack is approached by an old friend who has discovered a diamond worth millions in the flat of a man who died more than 20 years ago. It transpires the precious stone was stolen in a safety deposit box heist, but the dead mans passport shows he was out of the country when the crime was committed. Delving deeper into his past, the team discovers some well-concealed secrets - including a daughter whos still unaware of her true parentage

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives return home after their trip to South Africa, to find Nonnatus House has come under new management. The formidable Sister Ursula (Harriet Walter) has taken charge and introduced some drastic changes to the way the clinic is run, which Sister Julienne, bound by her vow of obedience, is powerless to oppose. The midwives come to the aid of a victim of domestic violence whose husband is about to be released from prison, and who risks losing everything if she seeks a divorce. Sister Mary Cynthia suffers further anxiety attacks, and Patsy receives distressing news about her father

programme.title: A Small Light
programme.desc: With Amsterdam almost empty of Jews, Miep and Jan do what they can to save the last remaining ones. Meanwhile, news of the Normandy landings arrives

programme.title: Art Detectives
programme.desc: DI Mick Palmer, sole member of the Heritage Crime Unit, is dispatched to the imposing Astleigh House in Yorkshire, where art historian Francis Crozier has been murdered

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharons husband Chris becomes seriously ill, leaving her facing a difficult decision. Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph star in an episode featuring an early screen appearance by Doon Mackichan

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Carvers self-interest and hard drinking finally cause him to go too far

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Joe bids farewell to the Mill and Letherbridge. Ronnie discovers a hidden crime when a teenage boy tries to hire his services, and later shares a positive counselling session with George. Medical drama, starring Stephen Boxer, Sean Gleeson and Stirling Gallacher

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Archie is enlisted to help save a mans life when a cleaner overhears her bosss murderous plans. At the Mill, Joes presence is sorely missed after he has left for America, while Jimmi goes to the police station to meet an old acquaintance

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Tom tries to work his way back up the career ladder by landing the post of consultant, while Kath also hopes to secure a new job as clinical matron, but doesnt realise Chrissie has applied for the same position. Ed decides to postpone his exams, unable to concentrate because of his growing concern for his father, and Lisa feels she is no longer one of the girls after being forced to reproach Jess and Donna, although a drink with Owen soon cheers her up. Former Coronation Street actor Chris Bisson guest stars

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Part one of two. Hasina Haque joins the cast as nurse Mads, who struggles to understand the stronger regional accents of her colleagues in her first job since leaving Pakistan, with serious repercussions. Two patients are admitted separately after being shot with ball bearings fired from an air rifle, and an incident at Holby College brings terror into the heart of the fully stretched ED. Guest starring Michelle Collins (Coronation Street), and featuring an appearance by Holby City actress Jaye Jacobs

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Carvers self-interest and hard drinking finally cause him to go too far

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Ronnie begins to fold under the pressure of the police investigation whilst Jack is torn between a rock and a hard place. Dot and Jims anniversary party comes to an abrupt end

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Dot struggles to come to terms with Dottys behaviour. Marsdens investigation hots up and the suspects begin to feel the pressure. Meanwhile, Ricky questions Biancas loyalty

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: The Herriots give Highland dancing a fling, while Siegfried catches fleas and a stag disappears. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy, Lynda Bellingham and Robert Hardy

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Jacks life hangs in the balance as he is rushed to hospital on the Barracuda. Meanwhile, Kens crafty ways backfire on him when he finds himself a victim of blackmail

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Tracking a local conman, Frank and Lu make some unlikely allies when they encounter a pair of deadly gangsters. Mark Benton and Jo Joyner star in the comedy drama about an oddball couple of private detectives who investigate crime in Stratford-upon-Avon

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sisters Sharon and Traceys lives are changed for ever when their husbands leave for work and never return. First episode of the popular comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Truly spots a bottle with a message inside floating down the river, and decides to catch it - so enlists the help of Clegg, Billy and Alvin to follow its elusive course and eventually read the mysterious contents. Long-running comedy, starring Frank Thornton, Peter Sallis, Keith Clifford and Brian Murphy

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The arrival of Cleggs cousin threatens to spell the end of the gangs gentle walks, so they resolve to get rid of him. Aubrey finds he can still beat Billy and Alvin cycling up hills, but discovers his own weakness. Starring Peter Sallis

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Has Anyone Seen Barrys Midlife Crisis?
programme.desc: Trulys plans to rescue Howard from his bedroom are given a boost when Auntie Wainwright puts some lightweight scaffolding up for sale - ideal for springing someone imprisoned on an upper floor. Long-running comedy series, starring Frank Thornton and Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Judge John Deed
programme.desc: Charlie is appointed to defend an animal rights activist accused of murdering an eminent scientist - a case that will be heard before her father. The defence barristers support for her clients cause leads her to make a series of unprofessional outbursts in court, while Jos relationship with Marc Thompson creates tension

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Jack is approached by an old friend who has discovered a diamond worth millions in the flat of a man who died more than 20 years ago. It transpires the precious stone was stolen in a safety deposit box heist, but the dead mans passport shows he was out of the country when the crime was committed. Delving deeper into his past, the team discovers some well-concealed secrets - including a daughter whos still unaware of her true parentage

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Tracking a local conman, Frank and Lu make some unlikely allies when they encounter a pair of deadly gangsters. Mark Benton and Jo Joyner star in the comedy drama about an oddball couple of private detectives who investigate crime in Stratford-upon-Avon

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The apparently motiveless murder of an American tourist found battered to death brings Dalziel back in contact with an old flame. Evidence leads the detective duo to a rough pub just outside Thorpburgh, where they discover a photograph of the murdered woman pictured with two soldiers. David Soul, Phyllis Logan and Lee Boardman guest star

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharons husband Chris becomes seriously ill, leaving her facing a difficult decision. Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph star in an episode featuring an early screen appearance by Doon Mackichan

programme.desc: The naturalist leads an expedition into an unexplored desert canyon in the Jebel Akhdar mountain range of Oman. With temperatures soaring, dehydration and heat stroke are a constant threat

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and a team of kayakers head to the Himalayas to attempt to row down the last great unexplored river in Bhutan. But theres a reason it has never been attempted before - it runs through a steep gorge which, according to legend, drops off the face of the planet

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and an elite team of rock climbers head to the desert of southern Oman to attempt the first ascent of a towering escarpment, hoping to discover the rare and elusive Arabian leopard

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and the team battle through the jungle into the heart of Indonesian Borneo. They are on their way to meet experts who have discovered ancient cave art thought to be among the oldest on the planet. But they have also heard rumours that the mountain range contains further unmapped caves - and Steve wants to be the first to track them down, and whatever is hidden within

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond takes a look at the BMW 6 Series cabriolet, and Jeremy Clarkson explores whether the VW Golf GTI has gone back to its roots. There is an investigation to see if it is possible to purchase a Porsche for a snip, and Cliff Richard is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson does his bit for the environment when he test drives the Toyota Prius, a hybrid car powered by petrol and electricity. The team awards the dubious accolade for the worst-handling car and a Mitsubishi Evo VIII faces a tough challenge when it goes head to head with a Lamborghini Murcielago. The Who frontman Roger Daltrey is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson heads from London to the ski slopes of Verbier in a Ferrari 612 Scaglietti, in the hope of beating James May and Richard Hammond, who undertake the journey by air. programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: The leader of the Belgian communists tries to take over Lifeline, while Francois and a group of evaders find themselves on a train that is about to be bombed

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Lifeline deals with a special agent and a Polish engineer who verifies the existence of Hitlers secret rocket technology. Bernard Hepton stars

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond takes a look at the BMW 6 Series cabriolet, and Jeremy Clarkson explores whether the VW Golf GTI has gone back to its roots. There is an investigation to see if it is possible to purchase a Porsche for a snip, and Cliff Richard is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson does his bit for the environment when he test drives the Toyota Prius, a hybrid car powered by petrol and electricity. The team awards the dubious accolade for the worst-handling car and a Mitsubishi Evo VIII faces a tough challenge when it goes head to head with a Lamborghini Murcielago. The Who frontman Roger Daltrey is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson heads from London to the ski slopes of Verbier in a Ferrari 612 Scaglietti, in the hope of beating James May and Richard Hammond, who undertake the journey by air. A rally car goes head to head with a bobsleigh, and comedian Eddie Izzard is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy cannot believe his ears when Rodney tells him he has found a girlfriend. The trouble is, the woman is old enough to be his mother - and to make matters worse, her husband is about to be released from prison

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del jumps at the opportunity to decorate the local Chinese restaurant to make a quick profit, and the results are outstanding in more ways than one. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del and Rodney reluctantly agree to let Grandad accompany them on their holiday abroad - a decision they come to regret. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: After lending assistance to a wealthy woman in distress, Del seizes a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to improve his social standing by launching his own chandelier-cleaning business. As part of the venture, he ropes a reluctant Rodney and Grandad into helping him. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney leaves home after a fight with Cassandra, and arranges a date with receptionist Tanya in an effort to make his wife jealous - but Dels interference ensures the plan fails to go as smoothly as it should. Christmas special first shown in 1990, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: Nana is staying with the family while she recuperates from her recent cataract operation and Barbara is anxious that Jim will hit the roof if she stays much longer. Antony is having love troubles, most of which are thanks to constant teasing from his family. When he finally storms off, the rest of the family are left blaming one another for who upset him most, all except Nana, who is fast asleep

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: First episode of Richard Curtiss comedy, starring Dawn French as the new vicar of a sleepy English village. Her arrival causes consternation among the locals - particularly stuffy councillor David Horton, who vows to have her ejected at all costs. Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet and Emma Chambers co-star

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The Songs of Praise crew visits Dibley to record a programme in the village church. However, when Geraldine develops a crush on the producer her wayward emotions threaten to plunge the proceedings into disaster. Comedy, guest starring Peter Capaldi (The Thick of It)

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine is keen to find a celebrity to open the autumn fair in style - and Alice inadvertently comes up with the ideal candidate by letting slip she is related to one Reg Dwight - AKA Elton John. Comedy, starring Dawn French, and Emma Chambers with a guest appearance by Kylie Minogue. First shown in 1994

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A violent storm destroys St Barnabass stained glass window, and Geraldine is put in charge of raising funds to replace it - but the others are unsure whether any of her outlandish ideas will actually work. Comedy, starring Dawn French, Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet, Emma Chambers and Liz Smith

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Local election fever hits the village and Geraldine finds she is a more popular candidate with the voters than over-confident parish council chairman David. Richard Curtiss comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A funeral for a pet bird inspires Geraldine to transform the church into an ark and hold a special service for the animals of the village - but David is far from impressed by her stunt. Comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: The Royles look forward to a joyous celebration in honour of Antonys 18th birthday, complete with a football-pitch cake and party balloons. But as the house fills up with family and friends, the hi-fi breaks down - prompting some home-brewed entertainment

programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: Jim and Nana fight over who is going to use the toilet first and Antony displays his juggling skills with potatoes, while Dave shows everyone a trick involving his middle finger

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Boycie reluctantly signs up for Farm Idol, a new reality TV show aimed at finding Britains sexiest rural workers, while Mrs Cakeworthy becomes suspicious of Marlene when a well-dressed man visits her while her husband is away. Comedy, starring John Challis and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mr Humphries is accused of dipping his hand in the till. His distinguished career appears to end in disgrace when he is dismissed after being found guilty. Comedy, with John Inman and Mollie Sugden

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Invented Yorkshire Funny Stuff
programme.desc: Howard is dismayed when Marina unwittingly buys him a life-like gorilla which attracts the attention of the local police. Meanwhile, a newspaper article prompts Truly, Clegg and Billy to try to track down Cyril Cooper - a man renowned for his green fingers and womanising ways. Comedy, starring Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Second Husband and the Showgirls
programme.desc: Tom and Smiler arrange an interesting blind date and Truly discovers his ex-wifes new husband is coming to town. Frank Thornton and Stephen Lewis star

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Ted gets even with entertainment manager Jeffrey by threatening to spill the beans about the dog he keeps hidden in his chalet. Holiday-camp comedy, starring Paul Shane and Ruth Madoc

programme.desc: Mr Humphries is accused of dipping his hand in the till. His distinguished career appears to end in disgrace when he is dismissed after being found guilty. Comedy, with John Inman and Mollie Sugden

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: The boys join Mrs Linekers Love Bureau hoping to find their perfect love matches. Richies video tells the potential suitors that he is, in fact, a duke and this secures him a date with a countess from Moldavia. Undeterred, he invites her to his place and arranges for Eddie to pretend to be his butler for the evening. Chaotic comedy, written by and starring Adrian Edmondson and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: Desperate duo Richie and Eddie try to improve their sex lives by using a spray apparently able to make them attractive to the opposite sex. Starring Rik Mayall and Adrian Edmondson

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary agrees to see a relationship counsellor, while Tonys efforts to impress Deborahs mother end in disaster. To compound their woes, the duo fear the arrival of Dorothys 10-year-old nephew will ruin their efforts to act maturely. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

Her arrival causes consternation among the locals - particularly stuffy councillor David Horton, who vows to have her ejected at all costs. Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet and Emma Chambers co-star

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The Songs of Praise crew visits Dibley to record a programme in the village church. However, when Geraldine develops a crush on the producer her wayward emotions threaten to plunge the proceedings into disaster. Comedy, guest starring Peter Capaldi (The Thick of It)

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine is keen to find a celebrity to open the autumn fair in style - and Alice inadvertently comes up with the ideal candidate by letting slip she is related to one Reg Dwight - AKA Elton John. Comedy, starring Dawn French, and Emma Chambers with a guest appearance by Kylie Minogue. First shown in 1994

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A violent storm destroys St Barnabass stained glass window, and Geraldine is put in charge of raising funds to replace it - but the others are unsure whether any of her outlandish ideas will actually work. Comedy, starring Dawn French, Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet, Emma Chambers and Liz Smith

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Local election fever hits the village and Geraldine finds she is a more popular candidate with the voters than over-confident parish council chairman David. Richard Curtiss comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A funeral for a pet bird inspires Geraldine to transform the church into an ark and hold a special service for the animals of the village - but David is far from impressed by her stunt. Comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: Dads Army

programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: The Royles look forward to a joyous celebration in honour of Antonys 18th birthday, complete with a football-pitch cake and party balloons. But as the house fills up with family and friends, the hi-fi breaks down - prompting some home-brewed entertainment

programme.title: The Royle Family

programme.desc: The boys join Mrs Linekers Love Bureau hoping to find their perfect love matches. Unfortunately, her efforts to unmask the killer result in a cover-up of her own. Zoe Wanamaker and Robert Lindsay star

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben and Susan experience problems in the bedroom, leaving Abi convinced she is the one to blame. Janey tries her hand at being a personal shopper and Michael gets caught up in a case of mistaken identity. Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker star

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: The Harper household is thrown into turmoil after a famous heart-throb visits Bens surgery, but while Susan is busy swooning, Michael spots a money-making opportunity. Guest starring Peter Capaldi, alongside Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Bored with the everyday routine in the Harper household, Susan decides to lead her life as a free and single girl again. Janey takes the opportunity to step into the role of home-maker and Ben simply runs away. Domestic comedy, starring Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Michael runs a booking agency for Rogers exclusive use, Susan hopes to take a step up in the literary world by attending a neighbours book club and Ben stakes a claim on the sofa

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben finds himself overrun with partners when plans to set up in Harley Street go awry, and Susan decides to give her husbands dental conference a miss in favour of writing her novel. Comedy, guest starring Windsor Davies, with Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot
